34. ## 3. 本轮新增内容
35. 
36. ### 3.1 新增项目级索引器与图模型
37. 
38. 新增文件：
39. 
40. - `src/core/project/projectGraph.js`
41. - `src/core/project/projectIndexer.js`
42. 
43. 当前提供的核心接口：
44. 
45. ```js
46. async function buildProjectIndex(rootFile)
47. ```
48. 
49. 当前返回的最小快照结构：
50. 
51. - `rootFile`
52. - `files`
53. - `graph`
54. - `keywordMap`
55. - `missingFiles`
56. - `cycles`
57. 
58. ### 3.2 当前能力范围
59. 
60. `buildProjectIndex(rootFile)` 已具备：
61. 
62. 1. 从根文件开始递归扫描 include 关系
63. 2. 聚合整个工程内所有文件的关键字使用
64. 3. 产出统一的 `ProjectGraph`
65. 4. 记录无法解析的缺失 include
66. 5. 遇到循环引用时进行熔断而不是无限递归
67. 
68. 这虽然还不是最终版 `ProjectIndexSnapshot`，但已经建立了**项目级统一输出**。
69. 
70. ---
71. 
72. ## 4. TDD 过程
73. 
74. ### 4.1 先写失败测试
75. 
76. 新增测试：
77. 
78. - `test/core/project/projectIndexer.test.js`
79. 
80. 先覆盖两个最小行为：
81. 
82. 1. **递归聚合**  
83.    多个 include 文件的关键字结果能汇总到一个项目快照中。
84. 
85. 2. **缺失引用记录**  
86.    某个 include 丢失时，项目扫描不会中断，并且会留下缺失记录。
87. 
88. 随后继续补了一条图模型行为：
89. 
90. 3. **图结构输出**  
91.    项目快照必须给出正向 include 边和反向依赖边。
92. 
93. 在生产代码尚未存在时先运行：
94. 
95. ```powershell
96. npx mocha test/core/project/projectIndexer.test.js
97. ```
98. 
99. 结果为红灯，错误原因明确：
100. 
101. - `Cannot find module '../../../src/core/project/projectIndexer'`
102. 
103. 这说明测试确实先于实现存在。
104. 
105. ### 4.2 再写最小实现
106. 
107. 实现思路：
108. 
109. 1. 复用已有 `includeScanner`
110. 2. 复用已有 `keywordScanner`
111. 3. 新建 `ProjectGraph`，集中维护：
112.    - 正向 include 边
113.    - 反向依赖边
114.    - 缺失文件
115.    - 循环链条
116. 4. 在 `projectIndexer` 中只做聚合，不重复实现词法扫描
117. 5. 保持实现最小，不提前引入缓存、线程池、协议层
118. 
119. ### 4.3 最后验证转绿
120. 
121. 先单跑新增测试：
122. 
123. ```powershell
124. npx mocha test/core/project/projectIndexer.test.js
125. ```
126. 
127. 再跑全量：
128. 
129. ```powershell
130. npm test
131. ```
132. 
133. 结果：
134. 
135. - `projectIndexer` / `ProjectGraph` 新增测试通过
136. - 全量测试通过
137. 
138. ---
139. 
140. ## 5. 当前实现的设计取舍
141. 
142. ## 5.1 先返回 `Map`，不急着做最终序列化格式
143. 
144. 当前 `keywordMap` 使用 `Map`，这是为了先让主线程内的聚合逻辑稳定下来。  
145. 等后续进入 Worker / LSP / 缓存阶段，再决定：
146. 
147. - 是否转换为普通对象
148. - 是否序列化为更稳定的 DTO
149. - 是否压缩为磁盘缓存格式
150. 
151. ## 5.2 先内建最小 resolver，不复用入口层函数
152. 
153. `projectIndexer` 当前在模块内部维护最小的 include 路径解析逻辑，而没有反向依赖 `src/extension.js` 里的旧入口函数。  
154. 这样可以避免新核心模块再次绑回旧入口。
155. 
156. ## 5.3 先建“最小图”，再建“更完整的项目状态机”
157. 
158. 本轮已经补上了 `ProjectGraph`，但它仍然是一个**最小可用图模型**，目前重点是：
159. 
160. - 给 `projectIndexer` 提供统一图输出
161. - 稳定 include 边与反向依赖边
162. - 把缺失文件与循环链条收口到项目层
163. 
164. 尚未推进的内容包括：
165. 
166. - 更完整的图查询接口
167. - 图与缓存层的序列化协议
168. - Provider 对图结构的直接消费
169. 
170. ---
171. 
172. ## 6. 验证结果
173. 
174. 执行：
175. 
176. ```powershell
177. npx mocha test/core/project/projectIndexer.test.js
178. npm test
179. ```
180. 
181. 结果：
182. 
183. - **新增索引器 / 图模型测试通过**
184. - **全量测试：81 passing, 0 failing**
185. 
186. 这说明本轮新增的项目级聚合基础没有破坏 Phase 0/1 已经稳定下来的行为。
187. 
188. ---
189. 
190. ## 7. 对总体计划的推进意义
191. 
192. 做完这一步之后，仓库已经具备了三层清晰边界：
193. 
194. 1. **文件级扫描层**  
195.    `includeScanner` / `keywordScanner`
196. 
197. 2. **项目级聚合层**  
198.    `projectIndexer` + `ProjectGraph`
199. 
200. 3. **客户端展示层**  
201.    `includeTreeProvider` / `keywordIndexProvider`
202. 
203. 后续推进 Worker / indexClient 时，就不再需要一边搬执行位置、一边重新定义数据形状。
204. 
205. ---
206. 
207. ## 8. 下一步建议
208. 
209. 下一批建议按这个顺序推进：
210. 
211. 1. 将当前 `collectIncludeFiles()` 的职责迁移到项目层
212. 2. 让 Include Tree 与 Keyword Index 开始消费统一项目快照
213. 3. 再决定是否引入 `worker_threads` 与 `indexClient`
214. 4. 为后续缓存层定义可持久化的项目快照形状
215. 
216. **一句话结论：本轮已经把“大文件工程级扫描”从“多个文件各扫各的”推进到了“有统一项目快照 + 最小图模型”的阶段，这是真正接入后台扫描 MVP 之前必须完成的一步。**
217.
````

</details>

<details>
<summary>99 lines</summary>

```
1. 'use strict';
2. 
3. const fs = require('fs');
4. const path = require('path');
5. const vscode = require('vscode');
6. 
7. const includeScanner = require('../../core/parser/includeScanner');
8. 
9. class IncludeItem extends vscode.TreeItem {
10.     constructor(filePath, exists) {
11.         super(path.basename(filePath), vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.Collapsed);
12.         this.filePath = filePath;
13.         this.children = [];
14.         this.tooltip = filePath;
15.         this.iconPath = new vscode.ThemeIcon(exists ? 'file' : 'warning');
16.         if (!exists) this.description = 'not found';
17.         if (exists) {
18.             this.command = { command: 'vscode.open', title: 'Open', arguments: [vscode.Uri.file(filePath)] };
19.         }
20.     }
21. }
22. 
23. class LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider {
24.     constructor({ searchFileFromPaths } = {}) {
25.         this.searchFileFromPaths = searchFileFromPaths;
26.         this._onDidChangeTreeData = new vscode.EventEmitter();
27.         this.onDidChangeTreeData = this._onDidChangeTreeData.event;
28.         this.root = null;
29.     }
30. 
31.     async scan() {
32.         const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
33.         if (!editor || editor.document.languageId !== 'lsdyna') {
34.             vscode.window.showWarningMessage('Open an LS-DYNA file first.');
35.             return;
36.         }
37.         await vscode.window.withProgress(
38.             { location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification, title: 'Scanning includes…', cancellable: false },
39.             async (progress) => {
40.                 this.root = await this._buildItem(editor.document.uri.fsPath, new Set(), progress);
41.                 this.root.collapsibleState = vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.Expanded;
42.                 this._onDidChangeTreeData.fire(undefined);
43.             }
44.         );
45.     }
46. 
47.     async _buildItem(filePath, visited, progress) {
48.         const exists = fs.existsSync(filePath);
49.         const item = new IncludeItem(filePath, exists);
50. 
51.         if (!exists || visited.has(filePath)) {
52.             item.collapsibleState = vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.None;
53.             return item;
54.         }
55. 
56.         visited.add(filePath);
57.         progress.report({ message: path.basename(filePath) });
58. 
59.         let includeEntries;
60.         let searchPaths;
61.         try {
62.             ({ includeEntries, searchPaths } = await includeScanner.collectIncludeDirectivesFromFile(filePath));
63.         } catch (error) {
64.             item.description = 'scan failed';
65.             item.tooltip = `${filePath}\n${error.message}`;
66.             item.collapsibleState = vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.None;
67.             return item;
68.         }
69. 
70.         for (const { fileName } of includeEntries) {
71.             let childPath;
72.             try {
73.                 childPath = this.searchFileFromPaths(fileName, searchPaths);
74.             } catch (e) {
75.                 childPath = path.resolve(path.dirname(filePath), fileName);
76.             }
77.             item.children.push(await this._buildItem(childPath, new Set(visited), progress));
78.         }
79. 
80.         item.collapsibleState = item.children.length > 0
81.             ? vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.Collapsed
82.             : vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.None;
83. 
84.         await new Promise(r => setImmediate(r));
85.         return item;
86.     }
87. 
88.     getTreeItem(element) { return element; }
89. 
90.     getChildren(element) {
91.         if (!this.root) return [];
92.         return element ? element.children : [this.root];
93.     }
94. }
95. 
96. module.exports = {
97.     LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider,
98. };
99.
```

440. 
441. // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
442. // LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider
443. // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
444. 
445. describe('LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider', () => {
446.     it('builds include trees without readFileSync on scanned files', async () => {
447.         const tempRoot = fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'lsdyna-include-tree-'));
448.         const submodelsDir = path.join(tempRoot, 'submodels');
449.         const mainFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'main.k');
450.         const aFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'a.key');
451.         const bFile = path.join(submodelsDir, 'b.key');
452. 
453.         fs.mkdirSync(submodelsDir);
454.         fs.writeFileSync(mainFile, '*INCLUDE_PATH_RELATIVE\nsubmodels\n*INCLUDE\na.key\nb.key\n');
455.         fs.writeFileSync(aFile, '*KEYWORD\n');
456.         fs.writeFileSync(bFile, '*KEYWORD\n');
457. 
458.         const provider = new LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider({ searchFileFromPaths });
459.         const originalReadFileSync = fs.readFileSync;
460.         fs.readFileSync = function patchedReadFileSync(filePath) {
461.             if (filePath === mainFile || filePath === aFile || filePath === bFile) {
462.                 throw new Error('include tree scanning should not use readFileSync for deck files');
463.             }
464.             return originalReadFileSync.apply(this, arguments);
465.         };
466. 
467.         try {
468.             const root = await provider._buildItem(mainFile, new Set(), { report() {} });
469.             assert.deepEqual(
470.                 root.children.map(child => child.filePath).sort(),
471.                 [aFile, bFile].sort()
472.             );
473.         } finally {
474.             fs.readFileSync = originalReadFileSync;
475.             fs.rmSync(tempRoot, { recursive: true, force: true });
476.         }
477.     });
478. });
479.

487.         const bigFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'big.k');
488.         const lines = ['*KEYWORD'];
489.         for (let i = 0; i < 50000; i++) lines.push(`$ line ${i}`);
490.         fs.writeFileSync(bigFile, lines.join('\n'));

path.join(tempRoot, 'b.key');\n+\n+        fs.writeFileSync(mainFile, '*KEYWORD\\n');\n+        fs.writeFileSync(aFile, '*KEYWORD\\n');\n+        fs.writeFileSync(bFile, '*KEYWORD\\n');\n+\n+        const provider = new LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider({ searchFileFromPaths });\n+        const snapshot = {\n+            graph: {\n+                toTree(filePath) {\n+                    assert.equal(filePath, mainFile);\n+                    return {\n+                        filePath: mainFile,\n+                        children: [\n+                            {\n+                                filePath: aFile,\n+                                children: [\n+                                    {\n+                                        filePath: bFile,\n+                                        children: [],\n+                                    },\n+                                ],\n+                            },\n+                        ],\n+                    };\n+                },\n+            },\n+        };\n+\n+        try {\n+            const root = provider._buildRootFromSnapshot(snapshot, mainFile);\n+            assert.equal(root.filePath, mainFile);\n+            assert.deepEqual(root.children.map(child => child.filePath), [aFile]);\n+            assert.deepEqual(root.children[0].children.map(child => child.filePath), [bFile]);\n+        } finally {\n+            fs.rmSync(tempRoot, { recursive: true, force: true });\n+        }\n+    });\n });\n*** End Patch\n"

### ✅ `apply_patch`

````json
"*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: D:\\Project\\vscode-lsdyna\\.github\\doc\\large_file_execution_record_phase2_include_tree_snapshot.md\n+# vscode-lsdyna 大文件方案执行记录（Phase 2：Include Tree 接入统一快照）\n+\n+## 1. 本轮目标\n+\n+在已经具备：\n+\n+- `projectIndexer`\n+- `ProjectGraph`\n+- `ProjectGraph.toTree()`\n+\n+之后，继续推进一个关键接线动作：\n+\n+**让 Include Tree 的构树路径开始消费统一项目快照，而不是继续完全依赖各自递归扫描。**\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 2. 为什么先接 Include Tree，而不是先接 Keyword Index\n+\n+两者都应该最终消费同一个项目快照，但 Include Tree 的接入成本更低，原因是：\n+\n+1. `ProjectGraph.toTree()` 已经天然对应 Include Tree 的展示结构\n+2. Include Tree 当前的核心问题是“递归扫描路径分散”，最适合先收口\n+3. Keyword Index 还涉及关键字聚合视图、分组和排序，接线复杂度略高\n+\n+因此本轮先把 Include Tree 接到统一快照，是一个更稳健的企业级推进顺序。\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 3. TDD 过程\n+\n+### 3.1 先写失败测试\n+\n+在 `test/extension.test.js` 的 `LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider` 测试组中，新增用例：\n+\n+- **builds include tree items from a project snapshot**\n+\n+测试目标很明确：\n+\n+1. 给 provider 一个伪造的项目快照\n+2. 由 `snapshot.graph.toTree(rootFile)` 返回嵌套树\n+3. provider 必须能够把这棵树转换成实际的 TreeItem 结构\n+\n+先运行：\n+\n+```powershell\n+npx mocha test/extension.test.js --grep \"LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider\"\n+```\n+\n+结果先失败：\n+\n+- `TypeError: provider._buildRootFromSnapshot is not a function`\n+\n+这说明新的行为约束先于实现存在。\n+\n+### 3.2 最小实现\n+\n+本轮在 `src/client/providers/includeTreeProvider.js` 中新增了两层最小能力：\n+\n+1. `buildProjectIndex` 依赖注入\n+2. `_buildRootFromSnapshot()` / `_buildItemFromTreeNode()`，把项目快照里的树形结构转换成实际的 Include Tree Item\n+\n+同时保留原有 `_buildItem()` 递归扫描路径作为回退，避免一次性切断旧逻辑。\n+\n+### 3.3 再跑验证\n+\n+先单跑 Include Tree 相关测试：\n+\n+```powershell\n+npx mocha test/extension.test.js --grep \"LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider\"\n+```\n+\n+再跑全量：\n+\n+```powershell\n+npm test\n+```\n+\n+结果：\n+\n+- Include Tree provider 测试通过\n+- 全量测试通过\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 4. 实际代码改动\n+\n+### 4.1 `src/client/providers/includeTreeProvider.js`\n+\n+新增：\n+\n+1. `buildProjectIndex` 构造注入\n+2. `_buildItemFromTreeNode(node)`\n+3. `_buildRootFromSnapshot(snapshot, rootFile)`\n+\n+调整：\n+\n+1. `scan()` 现在优先尝试统一快照路径\n+2. 如果没有注入 `buildProjectIndex`，则回退到旧的 `_buildItem()` 递归扫描\n+\n+这让迁移具备两个重要特征：\n+\n+- **新路径可用**\n+- **旧路径未被硬删除**\n+\n+### 4.2 `src/extension.js`\n+\n+接入：\n+\n+- `buildProjectIndex`\n+\n+并在构造 `LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider` 时注入：\n+\n+```js\n+const includeTreeProvider = new LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider({\n+    searchFileFromPaths,\n+    buildProjectIndex,\n+});\n+```\n+\n+这意味着实际运行时的 Include Tree 已开始消费项目级索引结果。\n+\n+### 4.3 `test/extension.test.js`\n+\n+新增测试覆盖：\n+\n+- provider 能否从统一项目快照构造嵌套树\n+\n+这样后续即使继续重构 Include Tree，只要偏离项目快照消费路径，测试就会立刻报警。\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 5. 设计取舍\n+\n+## 5.1 保留双路径，降低切换风险\n+\n+本轮没有直接删掉旧的 `_buildItem()` 递归扫描逻辑，而是先让：\n+\n+- 新路径：`buildProjectIndex` -> `graph.toTree()` -> TreeItem\n+- 旧路径：`_buildItem()` 递归扫描文件\n+\n+并存。\n+\n+这是为了降低企业级演进中的切换风险。  \n+只有当新路径被更多真实能力覆盖后，才适合彻底删除旧路径。\n+\n+## 5.2 Provider 只做“树项投影”，不做项目级聚合\n+\n+当前 provider 的职责仍然是：\n+\n+- 接收项目级结果\n+- 把项目级结果投影到 UI TreeItem\n+\n+而不是重新回到“既扫描、又聚合、又渲染”的大一统角色。  \n+这符合此前已经建立起来的分层方向。\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 6. 验证结果\n+\n+执行：\n+\n+```powershell\n+npx mocha test/extension.test.js --grep \"LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider\"\n+npm test\n+```\n+\n+结果：\n+\n+- **Include Tree provider 新增用例通过**\n+- **全量测试：83 passing, 0 failing**\n+\n+这说明新接线没有破坏现有功能，同时完成了 Include Tree 向统一项目快照的第一次落地。\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 7. 对总体计划的推进意义\n+\n+这是一个很关键的里程碑，因为它不是单纯“再加一个底层模块”，而是第一次把**已有 UI 能力真正接到了新的项目层架构上**。\n+\n+到这里，架构已经不是“只有 projectIndexer / graph 在底下准备着”，而是：\n+\n+1. 项目层已经产生统一快照\n+2. 图模型已经可以展开为树\n+3. Include Tree 已开始消费这条新路径\n+\n+这标志着 Phase 2 正在从“基础设施准备阶段”进入“旧功能逐步迁移到新架构”的阶段。\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 8. 下一步建议\n+\n+下一步最自然的推进顺序是：\n+\n+1. 让 Keyword Index 也开始消费统一项目快照\n+2. 将旧的 `collectIncludeFiles()` 路径继续收缩\n+3. 在此基础上再引入 `indexClient` / `worker_threads`\n+\n+**一句话结论：本轮不是继续堆底层模块，而是完成了新架构对现有 UI 能力的第一次真实接线，这一步非常关键。**\n*** End Patch\n"
````

</details>

```
1. 'use strict';
2. 
3. const fs = require('fs');
4. const path = require('path');
5. const vscode = require('vscode');
6. 
7. const keywordScanner = require('../../core/parser/keywordScanner');
8. 
9. class KeywordItem extends vscode.TreeItem {
10.     constructor(keyword) {
11.         super(keyword, vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.Collapsed);
12.         this.children = [];
13.         this.iconPath = new vscode.ThemeIcon('symbol-keyword');
14.     }
15. }
16. 
17. class KeywordUsageItem extends vscode.TreeItem {
18.     constructor(filePath, lineIndex, rootDir) {
19.         const rel = path.relative(rootDir, filePath);
20.         super(`${rel}  :${lineIndex + 1}`, vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.None);
21.         this.iconPath = new vscode.ThemeIcon('file');
22.         this.tooltip = `${filePath}:${lineIndex + 1}`;
23.         this.command = {
24.             command: 'extension.goToKeywordUsage',
25.             title: 'Go to keyword',
26.             arguments: [filePath, lineIndex],
27.         };
28.     }
29. }
30. 
31. class LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider {
32.     constructor({ collectIncludeFiles, shouldSkipAutomaticDocumentScan } = {}) {
33.         this.collectIncludeFiles = collectIncludeFiles;
34.         this.shouldSkipAutomaticDocumentScan = shouldSkipAutomaticDocumentScan;
35.         this._onDidChangeTreeData = new vscode.EventEmitter();
36.         this.onDidChangeTreeData = this._onDidChangeTreeData.event;
37.         this.roots = [];
38.         this._mode = 'local'; // 'local' | 'recursive'
39.     }
40. 
41.     _setMode(mode) {
42.         this._mode = mode;
43.         vscode.commands.executeCommand('setContext', 'lsdyna.keywordIndexMode', mode);
44.     }
45. 
46.     async _buildRootsAsync(filePaths, rootDir) {
47.         const keywordMap = new Map();
48.         for (const filePath of filePaths) {
49.             if (!fs.existsSync(filePath)) continue;
50.             const keywords = await keywordScanner.collectKeywordsFromFile(filePath);
51.             for (const { keyword, lineIndex } of keywords) {
52.                 if (!keywordMap.has(keyword)) keywordMap.set(keyword, []);
53.                 keywordMap.get(keyword).push({ filePath, lineIndex });
54.             }
55.         }
56.         return [...keywordMap.entries()]
57.             .sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b))
58.             .map(([keyword, usages]) => {
59.                 const item = new KeywordItem(keyword);
60.                 item.children = usages.map(({ filePath, lineIndex }) =>
61.                     new KeywordUsageItem(filePath, lineIndex, rootDir)
62.                 );
63.                 return item;
64.             });
65.     }
66. 
67.     refreshFromDocument(document) {
68.         if (this._mode !== 'local') return;
69.         if (!document || document.languageId !== 'lsdyna') return;
70.         if (this.shouldSkipAutomaticDocumentScan(document)) {
71.             this.roots = [];
72.             this._onDidChangeTreeData.fire(undefined);
73.             return;
74.         }
75.         const filePath = document.uri.fsPath;
76.         const rootDir = path.dirname(filePath);
77.         const keywordMap = new Map();
78.         for (const { keyword, lineIndex } of keywordScanner.collectKeywordsFromLineReader(
79.             document.lineCount,
80.             i => document.lineAt(i).text,
81.             filePath
82.         )) {
83.             if (!keywordMap.has(keyword)) keywordMap.set(keyword, []);
84.             keywordMap.get(keyword).push({ filePath, lineIndex });
85.         }
86.         this.roots = [...keywordMap.entries()]
87.             .sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b))
88.             .map(([keyword, usages]) => {
89.                 const item = new KeywordItem(keyword);
90.                 item.children = usages.map(({ filePath, lineIndex }) =>
91.                     new KeywordUsageItem(filePath, lineIndex, rootDir)
92.                 );
93.                 return item;
94.             });
95.         this._onDidChangeTreeData.fire(undefined);
96.     }
97. 
98.     async scan() {
99.         const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
100.         if (!editor || editor.document.languageId !== 'lsdyna') {
101.             vscode.window.showWarningMessage('Open an LS-DYNA file first.');
102.             return;
103.         }
104.         const rootFile = editor.document.uri.fsPath;
105.         const rootDir = path.dirname(rootFile);
106.         await vscode.window.withProgress(
107.             { location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification, title: 'Scanning keywords…', cancellable: false },
108.             async (progress) => {
109.                 const files = await this.collectIncludeFiles(rootFile, (count) => {
110.                     progress.report({ message: `${count} file${count === 1 ? '' : 's'} found` });
111.                 });
112.                 this.roots = await this._buildRootsAsync(files, rootDir);
113.                 this._setMode('recursive');
114.                 this._onDidChangeTreeData.fire(undefined);
115.             }
116.         );
117.     }
118. 
119.     setLocal() {
120.         this._setMode('local');
121.         if (vscode.window.activeTextEditor) {
122.             this.refreshFromDocument(vscode.window.activeTextEditor.document);
123.         } else {
124.             this.roots = [];
125.             this._onDidChangeTreeData.fire(undefined);
126.         }
127.     }
128. 
129.     getTreeItem(element) { return element; }
130. 
131.     getChildren(element) {
132.         if (element) return element.children;
133.         return this.roots;
134.     }
135. }
136. 
137. module.exports = {
138.     LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider,
139. };
140.
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>119 lines</summary>

```
1. 'use strict';
2. 
3. const fs = require('fs');
4. const path = require('path');
5. const vscode = require('vscode');
6. 
7. const includeScanner = require('../../core/parser/includeScanner');
8. 
9. class IncludeItem extends vscode.TreeItem {
10.     constructor(filePath, exists) {
11.         super(path.basename(filePath), vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.Collapsed);
12.         this.filePath = filePath;
13.         this.children = [];
14.         this.tooltip = filePath;
15.         this.iconPath = new vscode.ThemeIcon(exists ? 'file' : 'warning');
16.         if (!exists) this.description = 'not found';
17.         if (exists) {
18.             this.command = { command: 'vscode.open', title: 'Open', arguments: [vscode.Uri.file(filePath)] };
19.         }
20.     }
21. }
22. 
23. class LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider {
24.     constructor({ searchFileFromPaths, buildProjectIndex } = {}) {
25.         this.searchFileFromPaths = searchFileFromPaths;
26.         this.buildProjectIndex = buildProjectIndex;
27.         this._onDidChangeTreeData = new vscode.EventEmitter();
28.         this.onDidChangeTreeData = this._onDidChangeTreeData.event;
29.         this.root = null;
30.     }
31. 
32.     async scan() {
33.         const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
34.         if (!editor || editor.document.languageId !== 'lsdyna') {
35.             vscode.window.showWarningMessage('Open an LS-DYNA file first.');
36.             return;
37.         }
38.         await vscode.window.withProgress(
39.             { location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification, title: 'Scanning includes…', cancellable: false },
40.             async (progress) => {
41.                 if (this.buildProjectIndex) {
42.                     const snapshot = await this.buildProjectIndex(editor.document.uri.fsPath);
43.                     this.root = this._buildRootFromSnapshot(snapshot, editor.document.uri.fsPath);
44.                 } else {
45.                     this.root = await this._buildItem(editor.document.uri.fsPath, new Set(), progress);
46.                 }
47.                 this.root.collapsibleState = vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.Expanded;
48.                 this._onDidChangeTreeData.fire(undefined);
49.             }
50.         );
51.     }
52. 
53.     _buildItemFromTreeNode(node) {
54.         const exists = fs.existsSync(node.filePath);
55.         const item = new IncludeItem(node.filePath, exists);
56.         item.children = (node.children || []).map(childNode => this._buildItemFromTreeNode(childNode));
57.         item.collapsibleState = item.children.length > 0
58.             ? vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.Collapsed
59.             : vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.None;
60.         return item;
61.     }
62. 
63.     _buildRootFromSnapshot(snapshot, rootFile) {
64.         return this._buildItemFromTreeNode(snapshot.graph.toTree(rootFile));
65.     }
66. 
67.     async _buildItem(filePath, visited, progress) {
68.         const exists = fs.existsSync(filePath);
69.         const item = new IncludeItem(filePath, exists);
70. 
71.         if (!exists || visited.has(filePath)) {
72.             item.collapsibleState = vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.None;
73.             return item;
74.         }
75. 
76.         visited.add(filePath);
77.         progress.report({ message: path.basename(filePath) });
78. 
79.         let includeEntries;
80.         let searchPaths;
81.         try {
82.             ({ includeEntries, searchPaths } = await includeScanner.collectIncludeDirectivesFromFile(filePath));
83.         } catch (error) {
84.             item.description = 'scan failed';
85.             item.tooltip = `${filePath}\n${error.message}`;
86.             item.collapsibleState = vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.None;
87.             return item;
88.         }
89. 
90.         for (const { fileName } of includeEntries) {
91.             let childPath;
92.             try {
93.                 childPath = this.searchFileFromPaths(fileName, searchPaths);
94.             } catch (e) {
95.                 childPath = path.resolve(path.dirname(filePath), fileName);
96.             }
97.             item.children.push(await this._buildItem(childPath, new Set(visited), progress));
98.         }
99. 
100.         item.collapsibleState = item.children.length > 0
101.             ? vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.Collapsed
102.             : vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.None;
103. 
104.         await new Promise(r => setImmediate(r));
105.         return item;
106.     }
107. 
108.     getTreeItem(element) { return element; }
109. 
110.     getChildren(element) {
111.         if (!this.root) return [];
112.         return element ? element.children : [this.root];
113.     }
114. }
115. 
116. module.exports = {
117.     LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider,
118. };
119.
```

</details>

520.     });
521. });
522. 
523. // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
524. // LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider
525. // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
526. 
527. describe('LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider', () => {
528.     it('yields during large single-file keyword scans', async () => {
529.         const tempRoot = fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'lsdyna-keyword-index-'));
530.         const bigFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'big.k');
531.         const lines = ['*KEYWORD'];
532.         for (let i = 0; i < 50000; i++) lines.push(`$ line ${i}`);
533.         fs.writeFileSync(bigFile, lines.join('\n'));
534. 
535.         const provider = new LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider({ collectIncludeFiles, shouldSkipAutomaticDocumentScan });
536.         const originalSetImmediate = global.setImmediate;
537.         let yieldCount = 0;
538.         global.setImmediate = (callback, ...args) => {
539.             yieldCount++;
540.             callback(...args);
541.             return yieldCount;
542.         };
543. 
544.         try {
545.             await provider._buildRootsAsync([bigFile], tempRoot);
546.             assert.ok(yieldCount >= 2, `expected at least 2 yields, got ${yieldCount}`);
547.         } finally {
548.             global.setImmediate = originalSetImmediate;
549.             fs.rmSync(tempRoot, { recursive: true, force: true });
550.         }
551.     });
552. });
553. 
554. // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
555. // Debounce helpers
556. // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
557. 
558. describe('createActiveDocumentDebouncer', () => {
559.     it('refreshes only if the changed document is still active when the timer fires', () => {
560.         const scheduled = new Map();
561.         let nextTimerId = 1;
562.         let activeDocument = { uri: { fsPath: '/a.k' } };
563.         const refreshed = [];
564. 
565.         const debouncer = createActiveDocumentDebouncer(
566.             () => activeDocument,
567.             (document) => refreshed.push(document.uri.fsPath),
568.             500,
569.             (callback) => {
570.                 const timerId = nextTimerId++;
571.                 scheduled.set(timerId, callback);
572.                 return timerId;
573.             },
574.             (timerId) => scheduled.delete(timerId)
575.         );
576. 
577.         const changedDocument = { uri: { fsPath: '/a.k' } };
578.         debouncer(changedDocument);
579.         activeDocument = { uri: { fsPath: '/b.k' } };
580.         scheduled.forEach(callback => callback());
581. 
582.         assert.deepEqual(refreshed, []);
583.     });
584. });
585. 
586. // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
587. // large document guards
588. // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
589. 
590. describe('large document guards', () => {
591.     function createHugeDoc() {
592.         return {
593.             languageId: 'lsdyna',
594.             lineCount: 100001,
595.             version: 1,
596.             uri: { fsPath: '/project/huge.k' },
597.             lineAt() {
598.                 throw new Error('lineAt should not be used for very large automatic scans');
599.             },
600.         };
601.     }
602. 
603.     it('skips automatic line-length diagnostics for very large documents', () => {
604.         assert.deepEqual(collectLineLengthDiagnostics(createHugeDoc()), []);
605.     });
606. 
607.     it('skips automatic include decorations for very large documents', () => {
608.         assert.deepEqual(collectIncludeDecorationSets(createHugeDoc()), { resolved: [], missing: [] });
609.     });
610. 
611.     it('uses multi-line ranges for continued include decorations', () => {
612.         const doc = fakeDoc('*INCLUDE\npart_a +\npart_b.key\n', '/project/main.k');
613.         doc.languageId = 'lsdyna';
614. 
615.         const { missing } = collectIncludeDecorationSets(doc);
616. 
617.         assert.equal(missing.length, 1);
618.         assert.equal(missing[0].range.start.line, 1);
619.         assert.equal(missing[0].range.end.line, 2);
620.         assert.equal(missing[0].range.end.character, 'part_b.key'.length);
621.     });
622. 
623.     it('splits continued include decorations around skipped comment lines', () => {
624.         const doc = fakeDoc('*INCLUDE\npart_a +\n$ skip me\npart_b.key\n', '/project/main.k');
625.         doc.languageId = 'lsdyna';
626. 
627.         const { missing } = collectIncludeDecorationSets(doc);
628. 
629.         assert.equal(missing.length, 2);
630.         assert.deepEqual(
631.             missing.map(item => [item.range.start.line, item.range.end.line]),
632.             [[1, 1], [3, 3]]
633.         );
634.     });
635. 
636.     it('skips automatic include document links for very large documents', () => {
637.         assert.deepEqual(collectIncludeDocumentLinks(createHugeDoc()), []);
638.     });
639. 
640.     it('splits continued include document links around skipped comment lines', () => {
641.         const tempRoot = fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'lsdyna-include-links-'));
642.         const includeFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'part_apart_b.key');
643.         const mainFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'main.k');
644. 
645.         fs.writeFileSync(includeFile, '*KEYWORD\n');
646.         fs.writeFileSync(mainFile, '*INCLUDE\npart_a +\n$ skip me\npart_b.key\n');
647. 
648.         try {
649.             const doc = fakeDoc(fs.readFileSync(mainFile, 'utf8'), mainFile);
650.             const links = collectIncludeDocumentLinks(doc);
651. 
652.             assert.equal(links.length, 2);
653.             assert.deepEqual(
654.                 links.map(link => [link.range.start.line, link.range.end.line]),
655.                 [[1, 1], [3, 3]]
656.             );
657.         } finally {
658.             fs.rmSync(tempRoot, { recursive: true, force: true });
659.         }
660.     });
661. 
662.     it('treats very large documents as not being on an include line without scanning', () => {
663.         assert.equal(isIncludeLine(createHugeDoc(), 10), false);
664.     });
665. 
666.     it('treats continuation lines as include lines but skips comment gaps', () => {
667.         const doc = fakeDoc('*INCLUDE\npart_a +\n$ skip me\npart_b.key\n');
668.         doc.languageId = 'lsdyna';
669. 
670.         assert.equal(isIncludeLine(doc, 1), true);
671.         assert.equal(isIncludeLine(doc, 2), false);
672.         assert.equal(isIncludeLine(doc, 3), true);
673.     });
674. 
675.     it('skips local keyword index refresh for very large documents', () => {
676.         const provider = new LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider({ collectIncludeFiles, shouldSkipAutomaticDocumentScan });
677.         provider.roots = [{ label: 'stale' }];
678. 
679.         provider.refreshFromDocument(createHugeDoc());
680. 
681.         assert.deepEqual(provider.roots, []);
682.     });
683. 
684.     it('skips folding ranges for very large documents', () => {
685.         const provider = new LsDynaFoldingProvider();
686.         assert.deepEqual(provider.provideFoldingRanges(createHugeDoc()), []);
687.     });
688. 
689.     it('skips keyword symbols for very large documents', () => {
690.         const provider = new LsdynaKeywordSymbolProvider();
691.         assert.deepEqual(provider.provideDocumentSymbols(createHugeDoc()), []);
692.     });
693. 
694.     it('skips hover work for very large documents', () => {
695.         const provider = new LsdynaFieldHoverProvider();
696.         assert.equal(provider.provideHover(createHugeDoc(), { line: 0, character: 0 }), null);
697.     });
698. 
699.     it('skips parameter definitions for very large documents', () => {
700.         assert.equal(findParameterDefinitions(createHugeDoc()).size, 0);
701.     });
702. 
703.     it('skips parameter references for very large documents', () => {

705.     });
706. 
707.     it('returns no parameter at cursor for very large documents', () => {
708.         assert.equal(getParameterAtCursor(createHugeDoc(), { line: 0, character: 0 }), null);
709.     });
710. });

743.         assert.equal(result, null);
744.     });
745. });

1. 'use strict';
2. 
3. const assert = require('assert');
4. const fs = require('fs');
5. const os = require('os');
6. const path = require('path');
7. 
8. const { buildProjectIndex } = require('../../../src/core/project/projectIndexer');
9. 
10. describe('projectIndexer', () => {
11.     it('recursively aggregates included files and keyword usages into one project snapshot', async () => {
12.         const tempRoot = fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'lsdyna-project-index-'));
13.         const submodelsDir = path.join(tempRoot, 'submodels');
14.         const rootFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'main.k');
15.         const aFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'a.key');
16.         const bFile = path.join(submodelsDir, 'b.key');
17. 
18.         fs.mkdirSync(submodelsDir);
19.         fs.writeFileSync(rootFile, '*INCLUDE_PATH_RELATIVE\nsubmodels\n*INCLUDE\na.key\nb.key\n', 'utf8');
20.         fs.writeFileSync(aFile, '*PART\npart line\n', 'utf8');
21.         fs.writeFileSync(bFile, '*MAT_ELASTIC\nmat line\n', 'utf8');
22. 
23.         try {
24.             const snapshot = await buildProjectIndex(rootFile);
25. 
26.             assert.deepEqual(snapshot.files.sort(), [rootFile, aFile, bFile].sort());
27.             assert.deepEqual(
28.                 snapshot.keywordMap.get('PART').map(entry => entry.filePath),
29.                 [aFile]
30.             );
31.             assert.deepEqual(
32.                 snapshot.keywordMap.get('MAT_ELASTIC').map(entry => entry.filePath),
33.                 [bFile]
34.             );
35.             assert.deepEqual(snapshot.missingFiles, []);
36.             assert.deepEqual(snapshot.cycles, []);
37.         } finally {
38.             fs.rmSync(tempRoot, { recursive: true, force: true });
39.         }
40.     });
41. 
42.     it('records missing includes without aborting the rest of the project scan', async () => {
43.         const tempRoot = fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'lsdyna-project-index-'));
44.         const rootFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'main.k');
45. 
46.         fs.writeFileSync(rootFile, '*INCLUDE\nmissing.key\n*PART\n', 'utf8');
47. 
48.         try {
49.             const snapshot = await buildProjectIndex(rootFile);
50. 
51.             assert.deepEqual(snapshot.files, [rootFile]);
52.             assert.equal(snapshot.missingFiles.length, 1);
53.             assert.equal(snapshot.missingFiles[0].fromFile, rootFile);
54.             assert.equal(snapshot.missingFiles[0].fileName, 'missing.key');
55.             assert.deepEqual(
56.                 snapshot.keywordMap.get('PART').map(entry => entry.filePath),
57.                 [rootFile]
58.             );
59.         } finally {
60.             fs.rmSync(tempRoot, { recursive: true, force: true });
61.         }
62.     });
63. 
64.     it('builds a project graph with forward and reverse include edges', async () => {
65.         const tempRoot = fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'lsdyna-project-index-'));
66.         const rootFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'main.k');
67.         const childFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'child.key');
68. 
69.         fs.writeFileSync(rootFile, '*INCLUDE\nchild.key\n', 'utf8');
70.         fs.writeFileSync(childFile, '*PART\n', 'utf8');
71. 
72.         try {
73.             const snapshot = await buildProjectIndex(rootFile);
74. 
75.             assert.deepEqual(snapshot.graph.getChildren(rootFile), [childFile]);
76.             assert.deepEqual(snapshot.graph.getParents(childFile), [rootFile]);
77.         } finally {
78.             fs.rmSync(tempRoot, { recursive: true, force: true });
79.         }
80.     });
81. 
82.     it('materializes a nested include tree from the project graph in include order', async () => {
83.         const tempRoot = fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'lsdyna-project-index-'));
84.         const rootFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'main.k');
85.         const aFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'a.key');
86.         const bFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'b.key');
87.         const cFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'c.key');
88. 
89.         fs.writeFileSync(rootFile, '*INCLUDE\na.key\nb.key\n', 'utf8');
90.         fs.writeFileSync(aFile, '*INCLUDE\nc.key\n', 'utf8');
91.         fs.writeFileSync(bFile, '*PART\n', 'utf8');
92.         fs.writeFileSync(cFile, '*MAT_ELASTIC\n', 'utf8');
93. 
94.         try {
95.             const snapshot = await buildProjectIndex(rootFile);
96. 
97.             assert.deepEqual(snapshot.graph.toTree(rootFile), {
98.                 filePath: rootFile,
99.                 children: [
100.                     {
101.                         filePath: aFile,
102.                         children: [
103.                             {
104.                                 filePath: cFile,
105.                                 children: [],
106.                             },
107.                         ],
108.                     },
109.                     {
110.                         filePath: bFile,
111.                         children: [],
112.                     },
113.                 ],
114.             });
115.         } finally {
116.             fs.rmSync(tempRoot, { recursive: true, force: true });
117.         }
118.     });
119. });
120.
```

692.     );

695.     );
696.

699.     );
700.     const scheduleKeywordIndexRefresh = createActiveDocumentDebouncer(
701.         () => vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document,
702.         document => keywordIndexProvider.refreshFromDocument(document)

706.             if (vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document === e.document) {

708.             }
709.         })

627. 
628. // --- Shared include traversal ---
629. 
630. async function collectIncludeFiles(rootPath, onProgress) {
631.     const visited = new Set();
632.     const queue = [rootPath];
633.     const files = [];
634.     while (queue.length > 0) {
635.         const filePath = queue.shift();
636.         if (visited.has(filePath) || !fs.existsSync(filePath)) continue;
637.         visited.add(filePath);
638.         files.push(filePath);
639.         if (onProgress) onProgress(files.length);
640.     const { includeEntries, searchPaths } = await includeScanner.collectIncludeDirectivesFromFile(filePath);
641.         for (const { fileName } of includeEntries) {
642.             try { queue.push(searchFileFromPaths(fileName, searchPaths)); } catch (e) {}
643.         }
644.         await new Promise(r => setImmediate(r));
645.     }
646.     return files;
647. }
648. 
649. // --- Activate ---
650.

652.     context.subscriptions.push(
653.         vscode.languages.registerFoldingRangeProvider({ language: 'lsdyna' }, new LsDynaFoldingProvider())
654.     );

657.         vscode.languages.registerDocumentSymbolProvider({ language: 'lsdyna' }, new LsdynaKeywordSymbolProvider())
658.     );
659.

662.     );
663.

1. 'use strict';
2. 
3. const assert = require('assert');
4. const fs = require('fs');
5. const os = require('os');
6. const path = require('path');
7. const { fakeDoc } = require('./helpers');
8. const { LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider } = require('../src/client/providers/includeTreeProvider');
9. const { LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider } = require('../src/client/providers/keywordIndexProvider');
10. 
11. const {
12.     collectIncludeDecorationSets,
13.     collectIncludeDocumentLinks,
14.     collectLineLengthDiagnostics,
15.     createActiveDocumentDebouncer,
16.     findParameterDefinitions,
17.     findParameterReferences,
18.     findIncludeFileLines,
19.     getFilenameFromDocument,
20.     getSearchPath,
21.     getParameterAtCursor,
22.     isIncludeLine,
23.     LsdynaFieldHoverProvider,
24.     LsdynaKeywordSymbolProvider,
25.     LsDynaFoldingProvider,
26.     findNextKeywordInDocument,
27.     findPreviousKeywordInDocument,
28.     startLineOfCurrentKeyword,
29.     endLineOfCurrentKeyword,
30.     getFilenameFromKeyword,
31.     searchFileFromPaths,
32.     findNextKeyword,
33.     findPreviousKeyword,
34.     collectIncludeFiles,
35.     shouldSkipAutomaticDocumentScan,
36. } = require('../src/extension')._internals;
37. 
38. const FIXTURE_DIR = path.join(__dirname, 'Bolt_A_Explicit');
39. 
40. // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
41. // findParameterDefinitions
42. // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
43. 
44. describe('findParameterDefinitions', () => {
45.     it('finds basic *PARAMETER definitions', () => {
46.         const doc = fakeDoc('*PARAMETER\nR  tEnd  5.0\nI  count  10\n');
47.         const defs = findParameterDefinitions(doc);
48.         assert.equal(defs.size, 2);
49.         assert.ok(defs.has('TEND'));
50.         assert.equal(defs.get('TEND').value, '5.0');
51.         assert.equal(defs.get('COUNT').value, '10');
52.     });
53. 
54.     it('finds *PARAMETER_EXPRESSION definitions', () => {
55.         const doc = fakeDoc('*PARAMETER\nR  tEnd  5.0\n*PARAMETER_EXPRESSION\nR  dtPlot  tEnd/100.0\n');
56.         const defs = findParameterDefinitions(doc);
57.         assert.ok(defs.has('DTPLOT'));
58.         assert.equal(defs.get('DTPLOT').value, 'tEnd/100.0');
59.     });
60. 
61.     it('is case-insensitive on key lookup', () => {
62.         const doc = fakeDoc('*PARAMETER\nR  MyParam  42.0\n');
63.         const defs = findParameterDefinitions(doc);
64.         assert.ok(defs.has('MYPARAM'));
65.         assert.equal(defs.get('MYPARAM').name, 'MyParam');
66.     });
67. 
68.     it('skips comment lines inside *PARAMETER block', () => {
69.         const doc = fakeDoc('*PARAMETER\n$ a comment\nR  tEnd  5.0\n');
70.         const defs = findParameterDefinitions(doc);
71.         assert.equal(defs.size, 1);
72.     });
73. 
74.     it('stops collecting at next keyword', () => {
75.         const doc = fakeDoc('*PARAMETER\nR  tEnd  5.0\n*CONTROL_TERMINATION\nR  notAParam  0\n');
76.         const defs = findParameterDefinitions(doc);
77.         assert.equal(defs.size, 1);
78.     });
79. 
80.     it('records correct line and column for definition', () => {
81.         const doc = fakeDoc('*PARAMETER\nR   tEnd   5.0\n');
82.         const defs = findParameterDefinitions(doc);
83.         const def = defs.get('TEND');
84.         assert.equal(def.lineIndex, 1);
85.         assert.equal(doc.lineAt(def.lineIndex).text.slice(def.startChar, def.startChar + def.length), 'tEnd');
86.     });
87. 
88.     it('parses the real fixture file', () => {
89.         const fs = require('fs');
90.         const text = fs.readFileSync(path.join(FIXTURE_DIR, 'mainboltaexpl.k'), 'utf8');
91.         const doc = fakeDoc(text, path.join(FIXTURE_DIR, 'mainboltaexpl.k'));
92.         const defs = findParameterDefinitions(doc);
93.         assert.ok(defs.has('TEND'));
94.         assert.ok(defs.has('DTPLOT'));
95.         assert.ok(defs.has('BLTFORCE'));
96.     });
97. });
98. 
99. // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
100. // findParameterReferences
101. // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
102. 
103. describe('findParameterReferences', () => {
104.     it('finds &name references', () => {
105.         const doc = fakeDoc('*PARAMETER\nR  tEnd  5.0\n*CONTROL_TERMINATION\n     &tEnd\n');
106.         const refs = findParameterReferences(doc);
107.         const r = refs.filter(r => r.name === 'TEND');
108.         assert.equal(r.length, 1);
109.         assert.equal(r[0].lineIndex, 3);
110.     });
111. 
112.     it('finds multiple references to same parameter', () => {
113.         const doc = fakeDoc('*PARAMETER\nR  t  5.0\n*KEYWORD\n&t  &t\n');
114.         const refs = findParameterReferences(doc).filter(r => r.name === 'T');
115.         assert.equal(refs.length, 2);
116.     });
117. 
118.     it('finds bare name references in *PARAMETER_EXPRESSION values', () => {
119.         const doc = fakeDoc('*PARAMETER\nR  tEnd  5.0\n*PARAMETER_EXPRESSION\nR  dtPlot  tEnd/100.0\n');
120.         const refs = findParameterReferences(doc).filter(r => r.name === 'TEND');
121.         assert.equal(refs.length, 1);
122.         assert.equal(refs[0].lineIndex, 3);
123.     });
124. 
125.     it('does not treat expression definition name as a reference', () => {
126.         const doc = fakeDoc('*PARAMETER\nR  tEnd  5.0\n*PARAMETER_EXPRESSION\nR  dtPlot  tEnd/100.0\n');
127.         const refs = findParameterReferences(doc).filter(r => r.name === 'DTPLOT');
128.         assert.equal(refs.length, 0);
129.     });
130. 
131.     it('skips comment lines', () => {
132.         const doc = fakeDoc('*PARAMETER\nR  tEnd  5.0\n$ &tEnd this is a comment\n');
133.         const refs = findParameterReferences(doc).filter(r => r.name === 'TEND');
134.         assert.equal(refs.length, 0);
135.     });
136. });
137.

140. // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

<details>

```
1. 'use strict';
2. 
3. const fs = require('fs');
4. const path = require('path');
5. 
6. const includeScanner = require('../parser/includeScanner');
7. const keywordScanner = require('../parser/keywordScanner');
8. const { ProjectGraph } = require('./projectGraph');
9. 
10. function resolveIncludeFromSearchPaths(fileName, searchPaths) {
11.     for (const searchPath of searchPaths) {
12.         const fullPath = path.resolve(searchPath, fileName);
13.         if (fs.existsSync(fullPath)) return fullPath;
14.     }
15.     return null;
16. }
17. 
18. function addKeywordUsages(keywordMap, keywords) {
19.     for (const keywordEntry of keywords) {
20.         if (!keywordMap.has(keywordEntry.keyword)) keywordMap.set(keywordEntry.keyword, []);
21.         keywordMap.get(keywordEntry.keyword).push(keywordEntry);
22.     }
23. }
24. 
25. async function buildProjectIndex(rootFile) {
26.     const files = [];
27.     const keywordMap = new Map();
28.     const graph = new ProjectGraph();
29.     const visited = new Set();
30. 
31.     async function visit(filePath, ancestry = []) {
32.         if (visited.has(filePath)) return;
33.         visited.add(filePath);
34.         files.push(filePath);
35.         graph.addFile(filePath);
36. 
37.         const keywords = await keywordScanner.collectKeywordsFromFile(filePath);
38.         addKeywordUsages(keywordMap, keywords);
39. 
40.         const { includeEntries, searchPaths } = await includeScanner.collectIncludeDirectivesFromFile(filePath);
41.         for (const { fileName } of includeEntries) {
42.             const resolvedPath = resolveIncludeFromSearchPaths(fileName, searchPaths);
43.             if (!resolvedPath) {
44.                 graph.addMissingFile({
45.                     fromFile: filePath,
46.                     fileName,
47.                 });
48.                 continue;
49.             }
50. 
51.             if (ancestry.includes(resolvedPath) || resolvedPath === filePath) {
52.                 graph.addCycle({
53.                     fromFile: filePath,
54.                     toFile: resolvedPath,
55.                     path: [...ancestry, filePath, resolvedPath],
56.                 });
57.                 continue;
58.             }
59. 
60.             graph.addIncludeEdge(filePath, resolvedPath);
61.             await visit(resolvedPath, [...ancestry, filePath]);
62.         }
63.     }
64. 
65.     await visit(rootFile);
66. 
67.     return {
68.         rootFile,
69.         files,
70.         graph,
71.         keywordMap,
72.         missingFiles: graph.missingFiles,
73.         cycles: graph.cycles,
74.     };
75. }
76. 
77. module.exports = {
78.     buildProjectIndex,
79. };
80.
```

</details>

1. 'use strict';
2. 
3. class Position {
4.     constructor(line, character) { this.line = line; this.character = character; }
5. }
6. 
7. class Range {
8.     constructor(startLine, startChar, endLine, endChar) {
9.         this.start = new Position(startLine, startChar);
10.         this.end = new Position(endLine, endChar);
11.     }
12.     contains(pos) {
13.         if (pos.line < this.start.line || pos.line > this.end.line) return false;
14.         if (pos.line === this.start.line && pos.character < this.start.character) return false;
15.         if (pos.line === this.end.line && pos.character > this.end.character) return false;
16.         return true;
17.     }
18. }
19. 
20. class MarkdownString {
21.     constructor(value = '') {
22.         this.value = value;
23.     }
24. 
25.     appendMarkdown(value) {
26.         this.value += value;
27.         return this;
28.     }
29. 
30.     appendText(value) {
31.         this.value += String(value).replace(/\r?\n/g, '  \n');
32.         return this;
33.     }
34. }
35. 
36. class Hover {

40.     }
41. }

1. 'use strict';
2. 
3. // Intercept require('vscode') before any module tries to load it
4. const Module = require('module');
5. const vscodeMock = require('./vscode-mock');
6. const _load = Module._load;
7. Module._load = function (request, parent, isMain) {
8.     if (request === 'vscode') return vscodeMock;
9.     return _load.call(this, request, parent, isMain);
10. };
11. 
12. const { Range, Position } = vscodeMock;
13. 
14. /**
15.  * Creates a minimal fake TextDocument from a string.
16.  * Supports getText(), lineAt(), lineCount, getWordRangeAtPosition(), and uri.fsPath.
17.  */
18. function fakeDoc(text, fsPath = '/test/file.k') {
19.     const lines = text.split('\n');
20.     return {
21.         getText(range) {
22.             if (!range) return text;
23.             const { start, end } = range;
24.             if (start.line === end.line) return lines[start.line].slice(start.character, end.character);
25.             return lines.slice(start.line, end.line + 1)
26.                 .map((l, i, a) => i === 0 ? l.slice(start.character) : i === a.length - 1 ? l.slice(0, end.character) : l)
27.                 .join('\n');
28.         },
29.         lineCount: lines.length,
30.         uri: { fsPath },
31.         lineAt: i => ({ text: lines[i], range: new Range(i, 0, i, lines[i].length) }),
32.         getWordRangeAtPosition(position, regex) {
33.             const line = lines[position.line];
34.             if (!line) return undefined;
35.             const re = new RegExp(regex.source, 'g');
36.             let match;
37.             while ((match = re.exec(line)) !== null) {
38.                 const start = match.index;
39.                 const end = start + match[0].length;
40.                 if (position.character >= start && position.character <= end) {
41.                     return new Range(position.line, start, position.line, end);
42.                 }
43.             }
44.             return undefined;
45.         },
46.     };
47. }
48. 
49. module.exports = { fakeDoc, vscodeMock };
50.
```

</details>

752. 
753.     // Decorations: green for resolved paths, yellow for missing ones
754.     const resolvedDecoration = vscode.window.createTextEditorDecorationType({
755.         color: new vscode.ThemeColor('textLink.foreground'),
756.     });
757.     const missingDecoration = vscode.window.createTextEditorDecorationType({
758.         color: new vscode.ThemeColor('editorWarning.foreground'),
759.         fontStyle: 'italic',
760.     });
761.     context.subscriptions.push(resolvedDecoration, missingDecoration);
762. 
763.     function updateDecorations(editor) {
764.         if (!editor || editor.document.languageId !== 'lsdyna') return;
765.         const { resolved, missing } = collectIncludeDecorationSets(editor.document);
766. 
767.         editor.setDecorations(resolvedDecoration, resolved);
768.         editor.setDecorations(missingDecoration, missing);
769.     }
770. 
771.     context.subscriptions.push(
772.         vscode.window.onDidChangeActiveTextEditor(editor => updateDecorations(editor))
773.     );
774.     context.subscriptions.push(
775.         vscode.workspace.onDidChangeTextDocument(event => {
776.             if (vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document === event.document) {
777.                 updateDecorations(vscode.window.activeTextEditor);
778.             }
779.         })
780.     );
781. 
782.     updateDecorations(vscode.window.activeTextEditor);
783. 
784.     function updateIncludeLineContext(editor) {
785.         if (!editor || editor.document.languageId !== 'lsdyna') {
786.             vscode.commands.executeCommand('setContext', 'lsdyna.onIncludeLine', false);
787.             return;
788.         }
789.         const currentLine = editor.selection.active.line;
790.         const onInclude = isIncludeLine(editor.document, currentLine);
791.         vscode.commands.executeCommand('setContext', 'lsdyna.onIncludeLine', onInclude);
792.     }
793. 
794.     context.subscriptions.push(
795.         vscode.window.onDidChangeTextEditorSelection(e => updateIncludeLineContext(e.textEditor))
796.     );
797.     context.subscriptions.push(
798.         vscode.window.onDidChangeActiveTextEditor(editor => updateIncludeLineContext(editor))
799.     );
800. 
801.     updateIncludeLineContext(vscode.window.activeTextEditor);
802. 
803.     context.subscriptions.push(
804.         vscode.commands.registerCommand('extension.openIncludeFile', () => {
805.             const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
806.             if (!editor) return;
807.             try {
808.                 const fullPath = searchFileFromPaths(
809.                     getFilenameFromDocument(editor.document, editor.selection.active.line),
810.                     getSearchPath(editor.document)
811.                 );
812.                 vscode.workspace.openTextDocument(fullPath).then(doc => vscode.window.showTextDocument(doc));
813.             } catch (error) {
814.                 vscode.window.showErrorMessage(error.message);
815.             }
816.         })
817.     );
818. 
819.     context.subscriptions.push(
820.         vscode.commands.registerCommand('extension.selectKeyword', () => {
821.             const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
822.             if (!editor) return;
823.             const currentLine = editor.selection.active.line;
824.             try {
825.                 const startLine = startLineOfCurrentKeywordFromLineReader(
826.                     editor.document.lineCount,
827.                     i => editor.document.lineAt(i).text,
828.                     currentLine
829.                 );
830.                 const endLine = endLineOfCurrentKeywordFromLineReader(
831.                     editor.document.lineCount,
832.                     i => editor.document.lineAt(i).text,
833.                     currentLine
834.                 );
835.                 editor.selection = new vscode.Selection(
836.                     new vscode.Position(startLine, 0),
837.                     new vscode.Position(endLine + 1, 0)
838.                 );
839.             } catch (error) {
840.                 vscode.window.showErrorMessage(error.message);
841.             }
842.         })
843.     );
844. 
845.     context.subscriptions.push(
846.         vscode.commands.registerCommand('extension.jumpToNextKeyword', () => {
847.             const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
848.             if (!editor) return;
849.             try {
850.                 const nextLine = findNextKeywordInDocument(editor.document, editor.selection.active.line);
851.                 const position = new vscode.Position(nextLine, 0);
852.                 editor.selection = new vscode.Selection(position, position);
853.                 editor.revealRange(new vscode.Range(position, position), vscode.TextEditorRevealType.InCenter);
854.             } catch (error) {
855.                 vscode.window.showErrorMessage(error.message);
856.             }
857.         })
858.     );
859. 
860.     context.subscriptions.push(
```

````
1. # vscode-lsdyna 大文件方案执行记录（Phase 2：Include Tree 接入统一快照）
2. 
3. ## 1. 本轮目标
4. 
5. 在已经具备：
6. 
7. - `projectIndexer`
8. - `ProjectGraph`
9. - `ProjectGraph.toTree()`
10. 
11. 之后，继续推进一个关键接线动作：
12. 
13. **让 Include Tree 的构树路径开始消费统一项目快照，而不是继续完全依赖各自递归扫描。**
14. 
15. ---
16. 
17. ## 2. 为什么先接 Include Tree，而不是先接 Keyword Index
18. 
19. 两者都应该最终消费同一个项目快照，但 Include Tree 的接入成本更低，原因是：
20. 
21. 1. `ProjectGraph.toTree()` 已经天然对应 Include Tree 的展示结构
22. 2. Include Tree 当前的核心问题是“递归扫描路径分散”，最适合先收口
23. 3. Keyword Index 还涉及关键字聚合视图、分组和排序，接线复杂度略高
24. 
25. 因此本轮先把 Include Tree 接到统一快照，是一个更稳健的企业级推进顺序。
26. 
27. ---
28. 
29. ## 3. TDD 过程
30. 
31. ### 3.1 先写失败测试
32. 
33. 在 `test/extension.test.js` 的 `LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider` 测试组中，新增用例：
34. 
35. - **builds include tree items from a project snapshot**
36. 
37. 测试目标很明确：
38. 
39. 1. 给 provider 一个伪造的项目快照
40. 2. 由 `snapshot.graph.toTree(rootFile)` 返回嵌套树
41. 3. provider 必须能够把这棵树转换成实际的 TreeItem 结构
42. 
43. 先运行：
44. 
45. ```powershell
46. npx mocha test/extension.test.js --grep "LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider"
47. ```
48. 
49. 结果先失败：
50. 
51. - `TypeError: provider._buildRootFromSnapshot is not a function`
52. 
53. 这说明新的行为约束先于实现存在。
54. 
55. ### 3.2 最小实现
56. 
57. 本轮在 `src/client/providers/includeTreeProvider.js` 中新增了两层最小能力：
58. 
59. 1. `buildProjectIndex` 依赖注入
60. 2. `_buildRootFromSnapshot()` / `_buildItemFromTreeNode()`，把项目快照里的树形结构转换成实际的 Include Tree Item
61. 
62. 同时保留原有 `_buildItem()` 递归扫描路径作为回退，避免一次性切断旧逻辑。
63. 
64. ### 3.3 再跑验证
65. 
66. 先单跑 Include Tree 相关测试：
67. 
68. ```powershell
69. npx mocha test/extension.test.js --grep "LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider"
70. ```
71. 
72. 再跑全量：
73. 
74. ```powershell
75. npm test
76. ```
77. 
78. 结果：
79. 
80. - Include Tree provider 测试通过
81. - 全量测试通过
82. 
83. ---
84. 
85. ## 4. 实际代码改动
86. 
87. ### 4.1 `src/client/providers/includeTreeProvider.js`
88. 
89. 新增：
90. 
91. 1. `buildProjectIndex` 构造注入
92. 2. `_buildItemFromTreeNode(node)`
93. 3. `_buildRootFromSnapshot(snapshot, rootFile)`
94. 
95. 调整：
96. 
97. 1. `scan()` 现在优先尝试统一快照路径
98. 2. 如果没有注入 `buildProjectIndex`，则回退到旧的 `_buildItem()` 递归扫描
99. 
100. 这让迁移具备两个重要特征：
101. 
102. - **新路径可用**
103. - **旧路径未被硬删除**
104. 
105. ### 4.2 `src/extension.js`
106. 
107. 接入：
108. 
109. - `buildProjectIndex`
110. 
111. 并在构造 `LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider` 时注入：
112. 
113. ```js
114. const includeTreeProvider = new LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider({
115.     searchFileFromPaths,
116.     buildProjectIndex,
117. });
118. ```
119. 
120. 这意味着实际运行时的 Include Tree 已开始消费项目级索引结果。
121. 
122. ### 4.3 `test/extension.test.js`
123. 
124. 新增测试覆盖：
125. 
126. - provider 能否从统一项目快照构造嵌套树
127. 
128. 这样后续即使继续重构 Include Tree，只要偏离项目快照消费路径，测试就会立刻报警。
129. 
130. ---
131. 
132. ## 5. 设计取舍
133. 
134. ## 5.1 保留双路径，降低切换风险
135. 
136. 本轮没有直接删掉旧的 `_buildItem()` 递归扫描逻辑，而是先让：
137. 
138. - 新路径：`buildProjectIndex` -> `graph.toTree()` -> TreeItem
139. - 旧路径：`_buildItem()` 递归扫描文件
140. 
141. 并存。
142. 
143. 这是为了降低企业级演进中的切换风险。  
144. 只有当新路径被更多真实能力覆盖后，才适合彻底删除旧路径。
145. 
146. ## 5.2 Provider 只做“树项投影”，不做项目级聚合
147. 
148. 当前 provider 的职责仍然是：
149. 
150. - 接收项目级结果
151. - 把项目级结果投影到 UI TreeItem
152. 
153. 而不是重新回到“既扫描、又聚合、又渲染”的大一统角色。  
154. 这符合此前已经建立起来的分层方向。
155. 
156. ---
157. 
158. ## 6. 验证结果
159. 
160. 执行：
161. 
162. ```powershell
163. npx mocha test/extension.test.js --grep "LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider"
164. npm test
165. ```
166. 
167. 结果：
168. 
169. - **Include Tree provider 新增用例通过**
170. - **全量测试：83 passing, 0 failing**
171. 
172. 这说明新接线没有破坏现有功能，同时完成了 Include Tree 向统一项目快照的第一次落地。
173. 
174. ---
175. 
176. ## 7. 对总体计划的推进意义
177. 
178. 这是一个很关键的里程碑，因为它不是单纯“再加一个底层模块”，而是第一次把**已有 UI 能力真正接到了新的项目层架构上**。
179. 
180. 到这里，架构已经不是“只有 projectIndexer / graph 在底下准备着”，而是：
181. 
182. 1. 项目层已经产生统一快照
183. 2. 图模型已经可以展开为树
184. 3. Include Tree 已开始消费这条新路径
185. 
186. 这标志着 Phase 2 正在从“基础设施准备阶段”进入“旧功能逐步迁移到新架构”的阶段。
187. 
188. ---
189. 
190. ## 8. 下一步建议
191. 
192. 下一步最自然的推进顺序是：
193. 
194. 1. 让 Keyword Index 也开始消费统一项目快照
195. 2. 将旧的 `collectIncludeFiles()` 路径继续收缩
196. 3. 在此基础上再引入 `indexClient` / `worker_threads`
197. 
198. **一句话结论：本轮不是继续堆底层模块，而是完成了新架构对现有 UI 能力的第一次真实接线，这一步非常关键。**
199.
````

</details>


### ✅ `view`

**view the file at D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_execution_record_phase2_project_indexer.md.**

D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_execution_record_phase2_project_indexer.md

<details>
<summary>224 lines</summary>

````
1. # vscode-lsdyna 大文件方案执行记录（Phase 2：Project Indexer 起步）
2. 
3. ## 1. 本轮目标
4. 
5. 在已经完成 Phase 0/1（解析器抽取 + Provider 模块化）的基础上，继续推进到 Phase 2 的**第一块地基能力**：
6. 
7. 1. 引入项目级索引器
8. 2. 让多文件工程扫描拥有统一聚合结果
9. 3. 先解决“项目级结果长什么样”，再推进 Worker / indexClient / Provider 接线
10. 
11. ---
12. 
13. ## 2. 为什么这一步先做 projectIndexer，而不是直接上 Worker
14. 
15. Phase 2 原方案里同时包含：
16. 
17. - `projectGraph`
18. - `projectIndexer`
19. - `workerPool`
20. - `indexClient`
21. - Provider 接线
22. 
23. 如果直接上 Worker，而项目级输出结构还没稳定，就会出现两个问题：
24. 
25. 1. Worker 的输入输出协议容易反复变动
26. 2. Provider 后续会被迫跟着数据结构反复改
27. 
28. 因此本轮先把**主线程里的项目级聚合模型**做出来，确认最小可用快照格式，再把它搬进后台执行器。
29. 
30. 这一步仍然符合企业级渐进式思路：**先稳定数据边界，再切换执行边界。**
31. 
32. ---
33. 
34. ## 3. 本轮新增内容
35. 
36. ### 3.1 新增项目级索引器与图模型
37. 
38. 新增文件：
39. 
40. - `src/core/project/projectGraph.js`
41. - `src/core/project/projectIndexer.js`
42. 
43. 当前提供的核心接口：
44. 
45. ```js
46. async function buildProjectIndex(rootFile)
47. ```
48. 
49. 当前返回的最小快照结构：
50. 
51. - `rootFile`
52. - `files`
53. - `graph`
54. - `keywordMap`
55. - `missingFiles`
56. - `cycles`
57. 
58. ### 3.2 当前能力范围
59. 
60. `buildProjectIndex(rootFile)` 已具备：
61. 
62. 1. 从根文件开始递归扫描 include 关系
63. 2. 聚合整个工程内所有文件的关键字使用
64. 3. 产出统一的 `ProjectGraph`
65. 4. 将图模型展开为稳定的嵌套树结构（`toTree()`）
66. 5. 记录无法解析的缺失 include
67. 6. 遇到循环引用时进行熔断而不是无限递归
68. 
69. 这虽然还不是最终版 `ProjectIndexSnapshot`，但已经建立了**项目级统一输出**。
70. 
71. ---
72. 
73. ## 4. TDD 过程
74. 
75. ### 4.1 先写失败测试
76. 
77. 新增测试：
78. 
79. - `test/core/project/projectIndexer.test.js`
80. 
81. 先覆盖两个最小行为：
82. 
83. 1. **递归聚合**  
84.    多个 include 文件的关键字结果能汇总到一个项目快照中。
85. 
86. 2. **缺失引用记录**  
87.    某个 include 丢失时，项目扫描不会中断，并且会留下缺失记录。
88. 
89. 随后继续补了一条图模型行为：
90. 
91. 3. **图结构输出**  
92.    项目快照必须给出正向 include 边和反向依赖边。
93. 
94. 4. **树形输出**
95.    图模型必须能够按 include 顺序物化为嵌套树，供 Include Tree 后续直接消费。
96. 
97. 在生产代码尚未存在时先运行：
98. 
99. ```powershell
100. npx mocha test/core/project/projectIndexer.test.js
101. ```
102. 
103. 结果为红灯，错误原因明确：
104. 
105. - `Cannot find module '../../../src/core/project/projectIndexer'`
106. 
107. 这说明测试确实先于实现存在。
108. 
109. ### 4.2 再写最小实现
110. 
111. 实现思路：
112. 
113. 1. 复用已有 `includeScanner`
114. 2. 复用已有 `keywordScanner`
115. 3. 新建 `ProjectGraph`，集中维护：
116.    - 正向 include 边
117.    - 反向依赖边
118.    - 缺失文件
119.    - 循环链条
120. 4. 给 `ProjectGraph` 增加 `toTree()`，用于稳定输出树形结构
121. 5. 在 `projectIndexer` 中只做聚合，不重复实现词法扫描
122. 6. 保持实现最小，不提前引入缓存、线程池、协议层
123. 
124. ### 4.3 最后验证转绿
125. 
126. 先单跑新增测试：
127. 
128. ```powershell
129. npx mocha test/core/project/projectIndexer.test.js
130. ```
131. 
132. 再跑全量：
133. 
134. ```powershell
135. npm test
136. ```
137. 
138. 结果：
139. 
140. - `projectIndexer` / `ProjectGraph` / `toTree()` 新增测试通过
141. - 全量测试通过
142. 
143. ---
144. 
145. ## 5. 当前实现的设计取舍
146. 
147. ## 5.1 先返回 `Map`，不急着做最终序列化格式
148. 
149. 当前 `keywordMap` 使用 `Map`，这是为了先让主线程内的聚合逻辑稳定下来。  
150. 等后续进入 Worker / LSP / 缓存阶段，再决定：
151. 
152. - 是否转换为普通对象
153. - 是否序列化为更稳定的 DTO
154. - 是否压缩为磁盘缓存格式
155. 
156. ## 5.2 先内建最小 resolver，不复用入口层函数
157. 
158. `projectIndexer` 当前在模块内部维护最小的 include 路径解析逻辑，而没有反向依赖 `src/extension.js` 里的旧入口函数。  
159. 这样可以避免新核心模块再次绑回旧入口。
160. 
161. ## 5.3 先建“最小图”，再建“更完整的项目状态机”
162. 
163. 本轮已经补上了 `ProjectGraph`，但它仍然是一个**最小可用图模型**，目前重点是：
164. 
165. - 给 `projectIndexer` 提供统一图输出
166. - 稳定 include 边与反向依赖边
167. - 提前固化 Include Tree 未来会消费的树形结构
168. - 把缺失文件与循环链条收口到项目层
169. 
170. 尚未推进的内容包括：
171. 
172. - 更完整的图查询接口
173. - 图与缓存层的序列化协议
174. - Provider 对图结构的直接消费与接线
175. 
176. ---
177. 
178. ## 6. 验证结果
179. 
180. 执行：
181. 
182. ```powershell
183. npx mocha test/core/project/projectIndexer.test.js
184. npm test
185. ```
186. 
187. 结果：
188. 
189. - **新增索引器 / 图模型 / 树形输出测试通过**
190. - **全量测试：82 passing, 0 failing**
191. 
192. 这说明本轮新增的项目级聚合基础没有破坏 Phase 0/1 已经稳定下来的行为。
193. 
194. ---
195. 
196. ## 7. 对总体计划的推进意义
197. 
198. 做完这一步之后，仓库已经具备了三层清晰边界：
199. 
200. 1. **文件级扫描层**  
201.    `includeScanner` / `keywordScanner`
202. 
203. 2. **项目级聚合层**  
204.    `projectIndexer` + `ProjectGraph` + `toTree()`
205. 
206. 3. **客户端展示层**  
207.    `includeTreeProvider` / `keywordIndexProvider`
208. 
209. 后续推进 Worker / indexClient 时，就不再需要一边搬执行位置、一边重新定义数据形状。
210. 
211. ---
212. 
213. ## 8. 下一步建议
214. 
215. 下一批建议按这个顺序推进：
216. 
217. 1. 将当前 `collectIncludeFiles()` 的职责迁移到项目层
218. 2. 让 Include Tree 先开始消费 `ProjectGraph.toTree()` 结果
219. 3. 再让 Keyword Index 消费统一项目快照
220. 4. 再决定是否引入 `worker_threads` 与 `indexClient`
221. 5. 为后续缓存层定义可持久化的项目快照形状
222. 
223. **一句话结论：本轮已经把“大文件工程级扫描”从“多个文件各扫各的”推进到了“有统一项目快照 + 最小图模型 + 可直接展开的树形输出”的阶段，这是真正接入后台扫描 MVP 之前必须完成的一步。**
224.
````

</details>


### ✅ `apply_patch`

<details>
<summary>Arguments</summary>

````json
"*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: D:\\Project\\vscode-lsdyna\\.github\\doc\\large_file_execution_record_phase2_keyword_index_snapshot.md\n+# vscode-lsdyna 大文件方案执行记录（Phase 2：Keyword Index 接入统一快照）\n+\n+## 1. 本轮目标\n+\n+在已经完成：\n+\n+- `projectIndexer`\n+- `ProjectGraph`\n+- Include Tree 快照接线\n+\n+之后，把递归 Keyword Index 也迁移到同一个项目级快照入口：\n+\n+**让 Keyword Index 在递归模式下直接消费 `buildProjectIndex()` 返回的 `keywordMap`，不再自己先收集文件、再逐文件扫描关键字。**\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 2. 为什么这一步现在做\n+\n+Include Tree 已经证明“统一快照 -> Provider 投影”这条路径可行。  \n+如果 Keyword Index 继续保留：\n+\n+1. `collectIncludeFiles()`\n+2. `collectKeywordsFromFile()`\n+\n+这条独立递归链路，就会出现两个问题：\n+\n+1. 同一个工程被扫描两套递归路径\n+2. 项目层已经统一，但 Keyword Index 仍然绕过统一快照\n+\n+因此本轮的重点不是再发明新的扫描能力，而是把现有 Keyword Index 正式接回项目层边界。\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 3. TDD 过程\n+\n+### 3.1 先写失败测试\n+\n+先在 `test/extension.test.js` 中新增两个用例：\n+\n+1. `builds keyword roots from a project snapshot`\n+2. `uses the project snapshot during recursive scans when available`\n+\n+第一条先约束 provider 必须能把 `snapshot.keywordMap` 投影成 Tree roots。  \n+第二条再约束递归扫描模式必须优先走 `buildProjectIndex`，而不是继续调用旧的 `collectIncludeFiles()` 路径。\n+\n+随后又补了一条接线测试：\n+\n+3. `injects buildProjectIndex into the keyword index provider`\n+\n+先跑聚焦测试，结果先红：\n+\n+- `provider._buildRootsFromSnapshot is not a function`\n+- `collectIncludeFiles should not be called when buildProjectIndex is available`\n+- `provider.buildProjectIndex` 为 `undefined`\n+\n+这说明测试确实先于实现存在，而且失败原因都直接指向缺失能力。\n+\n+### 3.2 再写最小实现\n+\n+本轮保持最小实现：\n+\n+1. 在 `keywordIndexProvider` 中新增 `buildProjectIndex` 依赖注入\n+2. 新增 `_buildRootsFromKeywordMap()` / `_buildRootsFromSnapshot()`\n+3. 让 `scan()` 在递归模式下优先消费项目快照\n+4. 保留旧的 `_buildRootsAsync()` 作为回退路径\n+5. 在 `extension.js` 中把 `buildProjectIndex` 注入到 `LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider`\n+\n+### 3.3 验证转绿\n+\n+先跑聚焦测试，再跑全量测试。  \n+结果为绿，说明：\n+\n+- Keyword Index 已能从统一快照构树\n+- 递归模式已切换到统一项目快照\n+- local 模式逻辑未被改写\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 4. 实际代码改动\n+\n+### 4.1 `src/client/providers/keywordIndexProvider.js`\n+\n+新增：\n+\n+- `buildProjectIndex` 构造注入\n+- `_buildRootsFromKeywordMap(keywordMap, rootDir)`\n+- `_buildRootsFromSnapshot(snapshot, rootDir)`\n+\n+调整：\n+\n+- `scan()` 优先走 `buildProjectIndex(rootFile)` -> `snapshot.keywordMap`\n+- 没有注入 `buildProjectIndex` 时，仍回退到旧的 `collectIncludeFiles()` + `_buildRootsAsync()`\n+- `refreshFromDocument()` 继续走本地文档扫描逻辑，local 模式行为保持不变\n+\n+### 4.2 `src/extension.js`\n+\n+把：\n+\n+- `buildProjectIndex`\n+\n+注入到：\n+\n+- `LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider`\n+\n+这样实际扩展运行时，递归 Keyword Index 已经和 Include Tree 一样，开始消费统一项目快照。\n+\n+### 4.3 `test/extension.test.js`\n+\n+新增覆盖：\n+\n+1. Provider 能否直接从 `snapshot.keywordMap` 生成 roots\n+2. 递归扫描是否优先走项目快照路径\n+3. 激活阶段是否完成 `buildProjectIndex` 注入\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 5. 设计取舍\n+\n+## 5.1 保留 local 模式原行为\n+\n+本轮只迁移 **recursive** Keyword Index。  \n+`refreshFromDocument()` 仍直接读取当前打开文档的行内容，这是为了：\n+\n+1. 保持当前文件视图的即时性\n+2. 避免把“工程级聚合”和“单文档即时反馈”再次耦合在一起\n+\n+## 5.2 Provider 只负责投影，不再重复聚合\n+\n+迁移后，Keyword Index provider 的职责更清晰：\n+\n+- local 模式：投影当前文档\n+- recursive 模式：投影项目快照\n+\n+而不是继续自己承担“递归找文件 + 递归扫关键字 + 组装 UI”三件事。\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 6. 验证结果\n+\n+执行：\n+\n+```powershell\n+npx mocha test/extension.test.js --grep \"LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider|activate\"\n+npx mocha test/core/project/projectIndexer.test.js\n+npm test\n+git diff --check\n+```\n+\n+结果：\n+\n+- Keyword Index 新增快照测试通过\n+- 项目级索引器既有测试继续通过\n+- 全量测试通过\n+- diff 格式检查通过\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 7. 对总体计划的推进意义\n+\n+做到这一步之后，Phase 2 里两个主要递归视图都已经开始消费统一项目快照：\n+\n+1. Include Tree -> `snapshot.graph.toTree()`\n+2. Keyword Index -> `snapshot.keywordMap`\n+\n+这意味着项目层聚合边界已经真正成为 UI 层的统一输入。  \n+后续再把执行位置迁移到 worker / indexClient 时，就不需要为不同 Provider 维护两套递归扫描实现。\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 8. 一句话结论\n+\n+**本轮完成的是“Keyword Index 递归路径接回统一项目快照”，不是单纯减少几行代码，而是进一步收口了工程级扫描入口，让项目层架构真正开始被多个 UI 能力共同消费。**\n*** End Patch\n"
````

</details>

 describe('LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider', () => {
+    it('builds keyword roots from a project snapshot', () => {
+        const rootDir = 'D:\\Project\\vscode-lsdyna\\snapshot-root';
+        const aFile = path.join(rootDir, 'submodels', 'a.key');
+        const bFile = path.join(rootDir, 'b.key');
+        const provider = new LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider();
+        const snapshot = {
+            keywordMap: new Map([
+                ['PART', [
+                    { filePath: aFile, lineIndex: 1 },
+                    { filePath: bFile, lineIndex: 7 },
+                ]],
+                ['MAT_ELASTIC', [
+                    { filePath: bFile, lineIndex: 4 },
+                ]],
+            ]),
+        };
+
+        const roots = provider._buildRootsFromSnapshot(snapshot, rootDir);
+
+        assert.deepEqual(roots.map(item => item.label), ['MAT_ELASTIC', 'PART']);
+        assert.deepEqual(
+            roots[1].children.map(child => child.command.arguments),
+            [
+                [aFile, 1],
+                [bFile, 7],
+            ]
+        );
+    });
+
+    it('uses the project snapshot during recursive scans when available', async () => {
+        const rootFile = 'D:\\Project\\vscode-lsdyna\\snapshot-root\\main.k';
+        const provider = new LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider({
+            collectIncludeFiles: async () => {
+                throw new Error('collectIncludeFiles should not be called when buildProjectIndex is available');       
+            },
+            buildProjectIndex: async (filePath) => {
+                assert.equal(filePath, rootFile);
+                return {
+                    keywordMap: new Map([
+                        ['PART', [{ filePath: rootFile, lineIndex: 2 }]],
+                    ]),
+                };
+            },
+            shouldSkipAutomaticDocumentScan,
+        });
+        const originalActiveTextEditor = vscodeMock.window.activeTextEditor;
+        const originalWithProgress = vscodeMock.window.withProgress;
+        const originalProgressLocation = vscodeMock.ProgressLocation;
+
+        vscodeMock.window.activeTextEditor = {
+            document: {
+                languageId: 'lsdyna',
+                uri: { fsPath: rootFile },
+            },
+        };
+        vscodeMock.window.withProgress = async (_options, task) => task({ report() {} });
+        vscodeMock.ProgressLocation = { Notification: 15 };
+
+        try {
+            await provider.scan();
+
+            assert.equal(provider._mode, 'recursive');
+            assert.deepEqual(provider.roots.map(item => item.label), ['PART']);
+            assert.deepEqual(
+                provider.roots[0].children.map(child => child.command.arguments),
+                [[rootFile, 2]]
+            );
+        } finally {
+            vscodeMock.window.activeTextEditor = originalActiveTextEditor;
+            vscodeMock.window.withProgress = originalWithProgress;
+            vscodeMock.ProgressLocation = originalProgressLocation;
+        }
+    });
+
     it('yields during large single-file keyword scans', async () => {
         const tempRoot = fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'lsdyna-keyword-index-'));
         const bigFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'big.k');
@@ -551,6 +627,45 @@ describe('LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider', () => {

 });

+describe('activate', () => {
+    it('injects buildProjectIndex into the keyword index provider', () => {
+        const context = { subscriptions: [] };
+        const registrations = new Map();
+        const disposable = { dispose() {} };
+        const originalRegisterTreeDataProvider = vscodeMock.window.registerTreeDataProvider;
+        const originalOnDidChangeActiveTextEditor = vscodeMock.window.onDidChangeActiveTextEditor;
+        const originalOnDidChangeTextEditorSelection = vscodeMock.window.onDidChangeTextEditorSelection;
+        const originalCreateTextEditorDecorationType = vscodeMock.window.createTextEditorDecorationType;
+        const originalRegisterHoverProvider = vscodeMock.languages.registerHoverProvider;
+        const originalRegisterCodeLensProvider = vscodeMock.languages.registerCodeLensProvider;
+
+        vscodeMock.window.registerTreeDataProvider = (viewId, provider) => {
+            registrations.set(viewId, provider);
+            return disposable;
+        };
+        vscodeMock.window.onDidChangeActiveTextEditor = () => disposable;
+        vscodeMock.window.onDidChangeTextEditorSelection = () => disposable;
+        vscodeMock.window.createTextEditorDecorationType = () => disposable;
+        vscodeMock.languages.registerHoverProvider = () => disposable;
+        vscodeMock.languages.registerCodeLensProvider = () => disposable;
+
+        try {
+            extensionModule.activate(context);
+
+            const provider = registrations.get('lsdynaKeywordIndex');
+            assert.ok(provider instanceof LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider);
+            assert.equal(provider.buildProjectIndex, buildProjectIndex);
+        } finally {
+            vscodeMock.window.registerTreeDataProvider = originalRegisterTreeDataProvider;
+            vscodeMock.window.onDidChangeActiveTextEditor = originalOnDidChangeActiveTextEditor;
+            vscodeMock.window.onDidChangeTextEditorSelection = originalOnDidChangeTextEditorSelection;
+            vscodeMock.window.createTextEditorDecorationType = originalCreateTextEditorDecorationType;
+            vscodeMock.languages.registerHoverProvider = originalRegisterHoverProvider;
+            vscodeMock.languages.registerCodeLensProvider = originalRegisterCodeLensProvider;
+        }
+    });
+});
