445. describe('LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider', () => {
446.     it('builds include trees without readFileSync on scanned files', async () => {
447.         const tempRoot = fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'lsdyna-include-tree-'));
448.         const submodelsDir = path.join(tempRoot, 'submodels');
449.         const mainFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'main.k');
450.         const aFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'a.key');
451.         const bFile = path.join(submodelsDir, 'b.key');
452. 
453.         fs.mkdirSync(submodelsDir);
454.         fs.writeFileSync(mainFile, '*INCLUDE_PATH_RELATIVE\nsubmodels\n*INCLUDE\na.key\nb.key\n');
455.         fs.writeFileSync(aFile, '*KEYWORD\n');
456.         fs.writeFileSync(bFile, '*KEYWORD\n');
457. 
458.         const provider = new LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider({ searchFileFromPaths });
459.         const originalReadFileSync = fs.readFileSync;
460.         fs.readFileSync = function patchedReadFileSync(filePath) {
461.             if (filePath === mainFile || filePath === aFile || filePath === bFile) {
462.                 throw new Error('include tree scanning should not use readFileSync for deck files');
463.             }
464.             return originalReadFileSync.apply(this, arguments);
465.         };
466. 
467.         try {
468.             const root = await provider._buildItem(mainFile, new Set(), { report() {} });
469.             assert.deepEqual(
470.                 root.children.map(child => child.filePath).sort(),
471.                 [aFile, bFile].sort()
472.             );
473.         } finally {
474.             fs.readFileSync = originalReadFileSync;
475.             fs.rmSync(tempRoot, { recursive: true, force: true });
476.         }
477.     });
478. 
479.     it('builds include tree items from a project snapshot', () => {
480.         const tempRoot = fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'lsdyna-include-tree-'));
481.         const mainFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'main.k');
482.         const aFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'a.key');
483.         const bFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'b.key');
484. 
485.         fs.writeFileSync(mainFile, '*KEYWORD\n');
486.         fs.writeFileSync(aFile, '*KEYWORD\n');
487.         fs.writeFileSync(bFile, '*KEYWORD\n');
488. 
489.         const provider = new LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider({ searchFileFromPaths });
490.         const snapshot = {
491.             graph: {
492.                 toTree(filePath) {
493.                     assert.equal(filePath, mainFile);
494.                     return {
495.                         filePath: mainFile,
496.                         children: [
497.                             {
498.                                 filePath: aFile,
499.                                 children: [
500.                                     {
501.                                         filePath: bFile,
502.                                         children: [],
503.                                     },
504.                                 ],
505.                             },
506.                         ],
507.                     };
508.                 },
509.             },
510.         };
511. 
512.         try {
513.             const root = provider._buildRootFromSnapshot(snapshot, mainFile);
514.             assert.equal(root.filePath, mainFile);
515.             assert.deepEqual(root.children.map(child => child.filePath), [aFile]);
516.             assert.deepEqual(root.children[0].children.map(child => child.filePath), [bFile]);
517.         } finally {
518.             fs.rmSync(tempRoot, { recursive: true, force: true });
519.         }
520.     });
521. 
522.     it('uses the shared project snapshot loader during scans when available', async () => {
523.         const rootFile = path.join('project', 'snapshot-root', 'main.k');
524.         const aFile = path.join('project', 'snapshot-root', 'a.key');
525.         const provider = new LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider({
526.             searchFileFromPaths() {
527.                 throw new Error('searchFileFromPaths should not be used when loadProjectSnapshot is available');
528.             },
529.             loadProjectSnapshot: async (filePath) => {
530.                 assert.equal(filePath, rootFile);
531.                 return {
532.                     graph: {
533.                         toTree(treeRootFile) {
534.                             assert.equal(treeRootFile, rootFile);
535.                             return {
536.                                 filePath: rootFile,
537.                                 children: [
538.                                     { filePath: aFile, children: [] },
539.                                 ],
540.                             };
541.                         },
542.                     },
543.                 };
544.             },
545.         });
546.         const originalActiveTextEditor = vscodeMock.window.activeTextEditor;
547.         const originalWithProgress = vscodeMock.window.withProgress;
548.         const originalProgressLocation = vscodeMock.ProgressLocation;
549. 
550.         vscodeMock.window.activeTextEditor = {
551.             document: {
552.                 languageId: 'lsdyna',
553.                 uri: { fsPath: rootFile },
554.             },
555.         };
556.         vscodeMock.window.withProgress = async (_options, task) => task({ report() {} });
557.         vscodeMock.ProgressLocation = { Notification: 15 };
558. 
559.         try {
560.             await provider.scan();
561. 
562.             assert.ok(provider.root);
563.             assert.equal(provider.root.filePath, rootFile);
564.             assert.deepEqual(provider.root.children.map(child => child.filePath), [aFile]);
565.         } finally {
566.             vscodeMock.window.activeTextEditor = originalActiveTextEditor;
567.             vscodeMock.window.withProgress = originalWithProgress;
568.             vscodeMock.ProgressLocation = originalProgressLocation;
569.         }
570.     });
571. });
572. 
573. // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
574. // LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider
575. // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
576. 
577. describe('LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider', () => {
578.     it('builds keyword roots from a project snapshot', () => {
579.         const rootDir = path.join('project', 'snapshot-root');
580.         const aFile = path.join(rootDir, 'submodels', 'a.key');
581.         const bFile = path.join(rootDir, 'b.key');
582.         const provider = new LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider();
583.         const snapshot = {
584.             keywordMap: new Map([
585.                 ['PART', [
586.                     { filePath: aFile, lineIndex: 1 },
587.                     { filePath: bFile, lineIndex: 7 },
588.                 ]],
589.                 ['MAT_ELASTIC', [
590.                     { filePath: bFile, lineIndex: 4 },
591.                 ]],
592.             ]),
593.         };
594. 
595.         const roots = provider._buildRootsFromSnapshot(snapshot, rootDir);
596. 
597.         assert.deepEqual(roots.map(item => item.label), ['MAT_ELASTIC', 'PART']);
598.         assert.deepEqual(
599.             roots[1].children.map(child => child.command.arguments),
600.             [
601.                 [aFile, 1],
602.                 [bFile, 7],
603.             ]
604.         );
605.     });
606. 
607.     it('uses the project snapshot during recursive scans when available', async () => {
608.         const rootFile = path.join('project', 'snapshot-root', 'main.k');
609.         const provider = new LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider({
610.             collectIncludeFiles: async () => {
611.                 throw new Error('collectIncludeFiles should not be called when loadProjectSnapshot is available');
612.             },
613.             loadProjectSnapshot: async (filePath) => {
614.                 assert.equal(filePath, rootFile);
615.                 return {
616.                     keywordMap: new Map([

618.                     ]),
619.                 };

12.     collectIncludeDecorationSets,
13.     collectIncludeDocumentLinks,
14.     collectLineLengthDiagnostics,

44. describe('findParameterDefinitions', () => {
45.     it('finds basic *PARAMETER definitions', () => {
46.         const doc = fakeDoc('*PARAMETER\nR  tEnd  5.0\nI  count  10\n');
47.         const defs = findParameterDefinitions(doc);
48.         assert.equal(defs.size, 2);
49.         assert.ok(defs.has('TEND'));
50.         assert.equal(defs.get('TEND').value, '5.0');
51.         assert.equal(defs.get('COUNT').value, '10');
52.     });
53. 
54.     it('finds *PARAMETER_EXPRESSION definitions', () => {
55.         const doc = fakeDoc('*PARAMETER\nR  tEnd  5.0\n*PARAMETER_EXPRESSION\nR  dtPlot  tEnd/100.0\n');
56.         const defs = findParameterDefinitions(doc);
57.         assert.ok(defs.has('DTPLOT'));
58.         assert.equal(defs.get('DTPLOT').value, 'tEnd/100.0');
59.     });
60. 
61.     it('is case-insensitive on key lookup', () => {
62.         const doc = fakeDoc('*PARAMETER\nR  MyParam  42.0\n');
63.         const defs = findParameterDefinitions(doc);
64.         assert.ok(defs.has('MYPARAM'));
65.         assert.equal(defs.get('MYPARAM').name, 'MyParam');
66.     });
67. 
68.     it('skips comment lines inside *PARAMETER block', () => {
69.         const doc = fakeDoc('*PARAMETER\n$ a comment\nR  tEnd  5.0\n');
70.         const defs = findParameterDefinitions(doc);
71.         assert.equal(defs.size, 1);
72.     });
73. 
74.     it('stops collecting at next keyword', () => {
75.         const doc = fakeDoc('*PARAMETER\nR  tEnd  5.0\n*CONTROL_TERMINATION\nR  notAParam  0\n');
76.         const defs = findParameterDefinitions(doc);
77.         assert.equal(defs.size, 1);
78.     });
79. 
80.     it('records correct line and column for definition', () => {
81.         const doc = fakeDoc('*PARAMETER\nR   tEnd   5.0\n');
82.         const defs = findParameterDefinitions(doc);
83.         const def = defs.get('TEND');
84.         assert.equal(def.lineIndex, 1);
85.         assert.equal(doc.lineAt(def.lineIndex).text.slice(def.startChar, def.startChar + def.length), 'tEnd');
86.     });
87. 
88.     it('parses the real fixture file', () => {

91.         const doc = fakeDoc(text, path.join(FIXTURE_DIR, 'mainboltaexpl.k'));
92.         const defs = findParameterDefinitions(doc);
93.         assert.ok(defs.has('TEND'));
94.         assert.ok(defs.has('DTPLOT'));
95.         assert.ok(defs.has('BLTFORCE'));
96.     });
97. });
98. 
99. // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
100. // findParameterReferences
101. // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

105.         const doc = fakeDoc('*PARAMETER\nR  tEnd  5.0\n*CONTROL_TERMINATION\n     &tEnd\n');

111.

120.         const refs = findParameterReferences(doc).filter(r => r.name === 'TEND');

<details>
<summary>50 lines</summary>

```
1. 'use strict';
2. 
3. // Intercept require('vscode') before any module tries to load it
4. const Module = require('module');
5. const vscodeMock = require('./vscode-mock');
6. const _load = Module._load;
7. Module._load = function (request, parent, isMain) {
8.     if (request === 'vscode') return vscodeMock;
9.     return _load.call(this, request, parent, isMain);
10. };
11. 
12. const { Range, Position } = vscodeMock;
13. 
14. /**
15.  * Creates a minimal fake TextDocument from a string.
16.  * Supports getText(), lineAt(), lineCount, getWordRangeAtPosition(), and uri.fsPath.
17.  */
18. function fakeDoc(text, fsPath = '/test/file.k') {
19.     const lines = text.split('\n');
20.     return {
21.         getText(range) {
22.             if (!range) return text;
23.             const { start, end } = range;
24.             if (start.line === end.line) return lines[start.line].slice(start.character, end.character);
25.             return lines.slice(start.line, end.line + 1)
26.                 .map((l, i, a) => i === 0 ? l.slice(start.character) : i === a.length - 1 ? l.slice(0, end.character) : l)
27.                 .join('\n');
28.         },
29.         lineCount: lines.length,
30.         uri: { fsPath },
31.         lineAt: i => ({ text: lines[i], range: new Range(i, 0, i, lines[i].length) }),
32.         getWordRangeAtPosition(position, regex) {
33.             const line = lines[position.line];
34.             if (!line) return undefined;
35.             const re = new RegExp(regex.source, 'g');
36.             let match;
37.             while ((match = re.exec(line)) !== null) {
38.                 const start = match.index;
39.                 const end = start + match[0].length;
40.                 if (position.character >= start && position.character <= end) {
41.                     return new Range(position.line, start, position.line, end);
42.                 }
43.             }
44.             return undefined;
45.         },
46.     };
47. }
48. 
49. module.exports = { fakeDoc, vscodeMock };
50.
```

</details>

1. 'use strict';
2. 
3. class Position {
4.     constructor(line, character) { this.line = line; this.character = character; }
5. }
6. 
7. class Range {
8.     constructor(startLine, startChar, endLine, endChar) {
9.         this.start = new Position(startLine, startChar);
10.         this.end = new Position(endLine, endChar);
11.     }
12.     contains(pos) {
13.         if (pos.line < this.start.line || pos.line > this.end.line) return false;
14.         if (pos.line === this.start.line && pos.character < this.start.character) return false;
15.         if (pos.line === this.end.line && pos.character > this.end.character) return false;
16.         return true;
17.     }
18. }
19. 
20. class MarkdownString {
21.     constructor(value = '') {
22.         this.value = value;
23.     }
24. 
25.     appendMarkdown(value) {
26.         this.value += value;
27.         return this;
28.     }
29. 
30.     appendText(value) {
31.         this.value += String(value).replace(/\r?\n/g, '  \n');
32.         return this;
33.     }
34. }
35. 
36. class Hover {
37.     constructor(contents, range) {
38.         this.contents = Array.isArray(contents) ? contents : [contents];
39.         this.range = range;
40.     }
41. }
42. 
43. module.exports = {
44.     Position,
45.     Range,
46.     MarkdownString,
47.     Hover,
48.     Uri: { file: p => ({ fsPath: p }) },
49.     FoldingRange: class FoldingRange { constructor(s, e) { this.start = s; this.end = e; } },
50.     DocumentSymbol: class DocumentSymbol {},
51.     DocumentLink: class DocumentLink { constructor(r, t) { this.range = r; this.target = t; } },
52.     InlayHint: class InlayHint { constructor(p, l) { this.position = p; this.label = l; } },
53.     InlayHintKind: { Parameter: 2 },
54.     Diagnostic: class Diagnostic { constructor(r, m, s) { this.range = r; this.message = m; this.severity = s; } },
55.     DiagnosticSeverity: { Warning: 1 },
56.     SymbolKind: { Property: 6 },
57.     ThemeColor: class ThemeColor {},
58.     ThemeIcon: class ThemeIcon {},
59.     TreeItem: class TreeItem { constructor(l, s) { this.label = l; this.collapsibleState = s; } },
60.     TreeItemCollapsibleState: { None: 0, Collapsed: 1, Expanded: 2 },
61.     EventEmitter: class EventEmitter { constructor() { this.event = null; } fire() {} },
62.     window: { activeTextEditor: null, showErrorMessage: () => {}, showWarningMessage: () => {} },
63.     workspace: { textDocuments: [], onDidOpenTextDocument: () => ({}), onDidChangeTextDocument: () => ({}), onDidCloseTextDocument: () => ({}) },

579. function searchFileFromPaths(filePath, paths) {
580.     for (const searchPath of paths) {
581.         const fullPath = path.resolve(searchPath, filePath);
582.         if (fs.existsSync(fullPath)) return fullPath;
583.     }
584.     throw new Error(`${filePath} not found.`);
585. }
586. 
587. function findNextKeywordFromLineReader(lineCount, getLine, currentLine) {
588.     for (let i = currentLine + 1; i < lineCount; i++) {
589.         if (getLine(i).startsWith('*')) return i;
590.     }
591.     throw new Error('No more keywords found.');
592. }
593. 
594. function findNextKeyword(lines, currentLine) {
595.     return findNextKeywordFromLineReader(lines.length, i => lines[i], currentLine);
596. }
597. 
598. function findNextKeywordInDocument(document, currentLine) {
599.     return findNextKeywordFromLineReader(document.lineCount, i => document.lineAt(i).text, currentLine);
600. }
601. 
602. function findPreviousKeywordFromLineReader(lineCount, getLine, currentLine) {
603.     for (let i = currentLine - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
604.         if (getLine(i).startsWith('*')) return i;
605.     }
606.     throw new Error('No previous keywords found.');
607. }
608. 
609. function findPreviousKeyword(lines, currentLine) {
610.     return findPreviousKeywordFromLineReader(lines.length, i => lines[i], currentLine);

```
1. 'use strict';
2. 
3. const fs = require('fs');
4. const path = require('path');
5. const readline = require('readline');
6. 
7. const STREAM_SCAN_YIELD_INTERVAL = 50000;
8. 
9. function createIncludeDirectiveState(basePath) {
10.     return {
11.         basePath,
12.         keyword: '',
13.         cardCount: 0,
14.         includeEntries: [],
15.         searchPaths: [basePath],
16.         pendingInclude: null,
17.     };
18. }
19. 
20. function getIncludeDirectiveRule(keyword) {
21.     if (keyword === '*INCLUDE') {
22.         return { repeatable: true, filenameCard: 1 };
23.     }
24.     if (keyword.startsWith('*INCLUDE_MULTISCALE_SPOTWELD')) {
25.         return { repeatable: false, filenameCard: 2 };
26.     }
27.     if (keyword.startsWith('*INCLUDE') && !keyword.startsWith('*INCLUDE_PATH')) {
28.         return { repeatable: false, filenameCard: 1 };
29.     }
30.     return null;
31. }
32. 
33. function createIncludeSegment(line, lineIndex) {
34.     const trimmed = line.trim();
35.     return {
36.         lineIndex,
37.         startChar: line.indexOf(trimmed),
38.         endChar: line.trimEnd().length,
39.     };
40. }
41. 
42. function startIncludeEntry(line, lineIndex) {
43.     const trimmed = line.trim();
44.     const segment = createIncludeSegment(line, lineIndex);
45.     return {
46.         lineIndex: segment.lineIndex,
47.         startChar: segment.startChar,
48.         endLineIndex: segment.lineIndex,
49.         endChar: segment.endChar,
50.         parts: [trimmed.endsWith(' +') ? trimmed.slice(0, -2) : trimmed],
51.         segments: [segment],
52.         awaitingContinuation: trimmed.endsWith(' +'),
53.     };
54. }
55. 
56. function appendIncludeEntry(entry, line, lineIndex) {
57.     const trimmed = line.trim();
58.     const segment = createIncludeSegment(line, lineIndex);
59.     entry.parts.push(trimmed.endsWith(' +') ? trimmed.slice(0, -2) : trimmed);
60.     entry.segments.push(segment);
61.     entry.endLineIndex = segment.lineIndex;
62.     entry.endChar = segment.endChar;
63.     entry.awaitingContinuation = trimmed.endsWith(' +');
64. }
65. 
66. function includeEntryContainsLine(entry, lineIndex) {
67.     return (entry.segments || []).some(segment => segment.lineIndex === lineIndex);
68. }
69. 
70. function getIncludeEntryRanges(entry) {
71.     if (!entry.segments || entry.segments.length === 0) {
72.         return [{
73.             lineIndex: entry.lineIndex,
74.             startChar: entry.startChar,
75.             endLineIndex: entry.endLineIndex,
76.             endChar: entry.endChar,
77.         }];
78.     }
79. 
80.     const [firstSegment, ...remainingSegments] = entry.segments;
81.     const ranges = [{
82.         lineIndex: firstSegment.lineIndex,
83.         startChar: firstSegment.startChar,
84.         endLineIndex: firstSegment.lineIndex,
85.         endChar: firstSegment.endChar,
86.     }];
87. 
88.     for (const segment of remainingSegments) {
89.         const currentRange = ranges[ranges.length - 1];
90.         if (segment.lineIndex === currentRange.endLineIndex + 1) {
91.             currentRange.endLineIndex = segment.lineIndex;
92.             currentRange.endChar = segment.endChar;
93.             continue;
94.         }
95. 
96.         ranges.push({
97.             lineIndex: segment.lineIndex,
98.             startChar: segment.startChar,
99.             endLineIndex: segment.lineIndex,
100.             endChar: segment.endChar,
101.         });
102.     }
103. 
104.     return ranges;
105. }
106. 
107. function flushIncludeEntry(state) {
108.     if (!state.pendingInclude) return;
109.     const fileName = state.pendingInclude.parts.join('').trim();
110.     if (fileName) {
111.         const { lineIndex, startChar, endLineIndex, endChar, segments } = state.pendingInclude;
112.         state.includeEntries.push({ lineIndex, startChar, endLineIndex, endChar, fileName, segments });
113.     }
114.     state.pendingInclude = null;
115. }
116. 
117. function processIncludeDirectiveLine(state, line, lineIndex) {
118.     const trimmed = line.trim();
119. 
120.     if (line.startsWith('*')) {
121.         flushIncludeEntry(state);
122.         state.keyword = trimmed;
123.         state.cardCount = 0;
124.         return;
125.     }
126. 
127.     if (state.pendingInclude) {
128.         if (!trimmed || trimmed.startsWith('$')) return;
129.         appendIncludeEntry(state.pendingInclude, line, lineIndex);
130.         if (!state.pendingInclude.awaitingContinuation) {
131.             flushIncludeEntry(state);
132.         }
133.         return;
134.     }
135. 
136.     if (!trimmed || trimmed.startsWith('$')) return;
137. 
138.     if (state.keyword === '*INCLUDE_PATH') {
139.         state.searchPaths.push(trimmed);
140.         return;
141.     }
142.     if (state.keyword === '*INCLUDE_PATH_RELATIVE') {
143.         state.searchPaths.push(path.resolve(state.basePath, trimmed));
144.         return;
145.     }
146. 
147.     const includeRule = getIncludeDirectiveRule(state.keyword);
148.     if (!includeRule) return;
149. 
150.     state.cardCount++;
151.     if (includeRule.repeatable || state.cardCount === includeRule.filenameCard) {
152.         state.pendingInclude = startIncludeEntry(line, lineIndex);
153.         if (!state.pendingInclude.awaitingContinuation) {
154.             flushIncludeEntry(state);
155.         }
156.     }
157. }
158. 
159. function finalizeIncludeDirectiveState(state) {
160.     flushIncludeEntry(state);
161.     return { includeEntries: state.includeEntries, searchPaths: state.searchPaths };
162. }
163. 
164. function collectIncludeDirectivesFromLineReader(lineCount, getLine, basePath) {
165.     const state = createIncludeDirectiveState(basePath);
166.     for (let i = 0; i < lineCount; i++) {
167.         processIncludeDirectiveLine(state, getLine(i), i);
168.     }
169.     return finalizeIncludeDirectiveState(state);
170. }
171. 
172. async function collectIncludeDirectivesFromFile(filePath) {
173.     const state = createIncludeDirectiveState(path.dirname(filePath));
174.     const stream = fs.createReadStream(filePath, { encoding: 'utf8' });
175.     const lines = readline.createInterface({ input: stream, crlfDelay: Infinity });
176.     let lineIndex = 0;
177. 
178.     try {
179.         for await (const line of lines) {
180.             processIncludeDirectiveLine(state, line, lineIndex);
181.             lineIndex++;
182.             if (lineIndex % STREAM_SCAN_YIELD_INTERVAL === 0) await new Promise(r => setImmediate(r));
183.         }
184.     } finally {
185.         lines.close();
186.     }
187. 
188.     return finalizeIncludeDirectiveState(state);
189. }
190. 
191. module.exports = {
192.     collectIncludeDirectivesFromFile,
193.     collectIncludeDirectivesFromLineReader,
194.     getIncludeEntryRanges,
195.     includeEntryContainsLine,
196. };
197.
```

D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_rollout_plan.md:21:   当前插件已经能生成 Include Tree、递归收集关键字，并有一套单测覆盖。这意味着后续改造重点是**性能与架构升级**，不是从零定义业务行为。
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_rollout_plan.md:37:   - 高性能生成 Include Tree
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_rollout_plan.md:63:1. 超大 `.k/.key` 文件和包含大量子文件的工程，能够在**不阻塞 UI** 的前提下生成 Include Tree 与 Keyword Index。
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_rollout_plan.md:80:1. 打开超大工程后，手动触发 Include Tree / Keyword Index 扫描时，VS Code 不出现明显卡顿。
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_rollout_plan.md:138:   - Include Tree 根节点
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_rollout_plan.md:229:- 现有 Include Tree / Keyword Index 功能行为不变
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_rollout_plan.md:288:- [ ] 把 Include Tree 与 Keyword Index 的“扫描触发”改为调用 `indexClient`
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_rollout_plan.md:296:- 手动扫描 Include Tree / Keyword Index 时，UI 线程不承担递归全扫描
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_rollout_plan.md:414:- [ ] 先迁移 Include Tree / Keyword Index
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_rollout_plan.md:501:1. 打开超大主文件，手动扫描 Include Tree
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_rollout_plan.md:563:**一句话总结：这个方案能做，而且值得做；但最优落地方式不是“一次性大重写”，而是“围绕当前 Include Tree / Keyword Index 能力做渐进式架构升级”。**
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_plan.md:41:为了提升前端仿真工程师的模型构建与排错效率，将此类高度专业化的工程模型文件集成至如Visual Studio Code (VS Code) 这样的通用集成开发环境（IDE）中已成为行业共识 [5]。现有的 `vscode-lsdyna` 插件虽然初步提供了语法高亮、代码片段插入以及基础的引用关系树（Include Tree）和关键字索引（Keyword Index）功能 [5, 6]，但其底层的解析架构在面对动辄数百兆的工程级模型时暴露出极其严重的性能瓶颈。传统的全量字符串加载与正则表达式匹配机制在解析大文件时，会彻底阻塞VS Code的单一JavaScript主线程，导致编辑器出现灾难性的UI卡顿、输入延迟甚至进程崩溃 [7]。
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_plan.md:80:当解析器检测到主文件引用的庞大 Include Tree 时，主导程并不会依次串行读取这数十个 `.key` 文件，而是将不同的文件路径作为独立的解析任务（Tasks）派发给后端的计算工作线程（Compute Worker Pool） [16]。由于大型车型项目中各模块文件相对独立，这种基于文件粒度的任务分发能够极大地发挥现代多核 CPU 的并行计算潜力 [18]。
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_plan.md:97:这种机制最为核心的性能红利在于“智能跨越”（Intelligent Bypassing）。对于像 `*NODE` 或 `*ELEMENT_SOLID` 这样通常包含数百万行海量数值型参数矩阵的块落，如果当前的解析任务仅仅是为了提取 Include Tree 与总览性的 Keyword Index，那么引擎在识别出头标后，只需在字节流中统计换行符的数量，直接跳过数以百万计的数值行，直至捕获到下一个位于行首的 `0x2A`。通过这种无需分配字符串内存的跳跃扫描，解析 400MB 的文件耗时可从传统的十几秒被暴烈压缩至几百毫秒以内，其时间复杂度虽然在理论上依然是 $\mathcal{O}(B)$（$B$ 为文件字节数），但由于完全避免了内存分配与垃圾回收开销，其操作常数被降低了几个数量级。
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_plan.md:149:一旦底层文件的时间戳自上次关闭后毫无更改，L2 缓存管理器便会将 FlatBuffers 二进制数据块直接映射进内存，绕过词法解析器、语法分析器和树生成器的所有流程，瞬间在插件界面上复原包含所有层级深度的 Include Tree 列表与 Keyword Index 全局变量字典，从而将项目的完全冷启动时间由几分钟压缩至几百毫秒之内。
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_plan.md:157:在底层提供了极致性能解析、无阻塞并发、精准增量和严密缓存后，原本难以实现的高级交互功能——完整的 Include Tree 以及可检索的 Keyword Index——的落地便成为了单纯的数据渲染逻辑操作。
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_plan.md:160:Include Tree 旨在通过侧边栏为用户呈现项目的所有嵌套层级关系 [5, 6]。由于部分劣质模型可能存在非法的人工编辑导致文件之间的“环状死锁引用”（例如 A 引入了 B，B 又引入了 A）[9]。如果在构建图的阶段不加防范，将导致无限深度的递归从而使得 VS Code 栈溢出崩溃。
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_plan.md:175:这些底层的性能保障与算法创新，最终支撑起了一个功能完备、能够实时进行包含循环依赖智能检测的 Include Tree 展现，以及包含智能折叠海量冗余数据的 Keyword Index 交互检索功能。这种完全以数据驱动性能前置为核心导向的插件系统架构，不但大幅提升了车辆分析模型维护的智能化水平与软件研发人员的代码交互体验，更为未来集成更加复杂的有限元仿真环境语法分析、智能报错语义追踪甚至三维数据轻量化可视化等延伸性工程特性，奠定了极其坚实且具有无限扩展弹性的系统基座。
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_plan.md:229:    *   **状态比对机制**：在 SQLite 中记录已解析文件的物理路径、提取出的 Include Tree 结构、关键字索引表以及该文件的修改时间戳（`mtime`）。
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_plan.md:232:### 5. Include Tree 路径决议模块的特殊处理
D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_plan.md:292:本指南旨在为开发团队（尤其是新加入的开发者）提供一套全新、极致优化的高性能解析架构方案及其实施路线。核心目标是：在加载与编辑数百兆级别的模型时，能够瞬间生成引用关系（Include Tree）与关键字索引（Keyword Index），同时维持 IDE 界面的绝对丝滑与零卡顿体验。

### ✅ `view`

D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_execution_record_phase2_include_tree_snapshot.md (lines 1-120)

<details>
<summary>120 lines</summary>

````
1. # vscode-lsdyna 大文件方案执行记录（Phase 2：Include Tree 接入统一快照）
2. 
3. ## 1. 本轮目标
4. 
5. 在已经具备：
6. 
7. - `projectIndexer`
8. - `ProjectGraph`
9. - `ProjectGraph.toTree()`
10. 
11. 之后，继续推进一个关键接线动作：
12. 
13. **让 Include Tree 的构树路径开始消费统一项目快照，而不是继续完全依赖各自递归扫描。**
14. 
15. ---
16. 
17. ## 2. 为什么先接 Include Tree，而不是先接 Keyword Index
18. 
19. 两者都应该最终消费同一个项目快照，但 Include Tree 的接入成本更低，原因是：
20. 
21. 1. `ProjectGraph.toTree()` 已经天然对应 Include Tree 的展示结构
22. 2. Include Tree 当前的核心问题是“递归扫描路径分散”，最适合先收口
23. 3. Keyword Index 还涉及关键字聚合视图、分组和排序，接线复杂度略高
24. 
25. 因此本轮先把 Include Tree 接到统一快照，是一个更稳健的企业级推进顺序。
26. 
27. ---
28. 
29. ## 3. TDD 过程
30. 
31. ### 3.1 先写失败测试
32. 
33. 在 `test/extension.test.js` 的 `LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider` 测试组中，新增用例：
34. 
35. - **builds include tree items from a project snapshot**
36. 
37. 测试目标很明确：
38. 
39. 1. 给 provider 一个伪造的项目快照
40. 2. 由 `snapshot.graph.toTree(rootFile)` 返回嵌套树
41. 3. provider 必须能够把这棵树转换成实际的 TreeItem 结构
42. 
43. 先运行：
44. 
45. ```powershell
46. npx mocha test/extension.test.js --grep "LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider"
47. ```
48. 
49. 结果先失败：
50. 
51. - `TypeError: provider._buildRootFromSnapshot is not a function`
52. 
53. 这说明新的行为约束先于实现存在。
54. 
55. ### 3.2 最小实现
56. 
57. 本轮在 `src/client/providers/includeTreeProvider.js` 中新增了两层最小能力：
58. 
59. 1. `buildProjectIndex` 依赖注入
60. 2. `_buildRootFromSnapshot()` / `_buildItemFromTreeNode()`，把项目快照里的树形结构转换成实际的 Include Tree Item
61. 
62. 同时保留原有 `_buildItem()` 递归扫描路径作为回退，避免一次性切断旧逻辑。
63. 
64. ### 3.3 再跑验证
65. 
66. 先单跑 Include Tree 相关测试：
67. 
68. ```powershell
69. npx mocha test/extension.test.js --grep "LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider"
70. ```
71. 
72. 再跑全量：
73. 
74. ```powershell
75. npm test
76. ```
77. 
78. 结果：
79. 
80. - Include Tree provider 测试通过
81. - 全量测试通过
82. 
83. ---
84. 
85. ## 4. 实际代码改动
86. 
87. ### 4.1 `src/client/providers/includeTreeProvider.js`
88. 
89. 新增：
90. 
91. 1. `buildProjectIndex` 构造注入
92. 2. `_buildItemFromTreeNode(node)`
93. 3. `_buildRootFromSnapshot(snapshot, rootFile)`
94. 
95. 调整：
96. 
97. 1. `scan()` 现在优先尝试统一快照路径
98. 2. 如果没有注入 `buildProjectIndex`，则回退到旧的 `_buildItem()` 递归扫描
99. 
100. 这让迁移具备两个重要特征：
101. 
102. - **新路径可用**
103. - **旧路径未被硬删除**
104. 
105. ### 4.2 `src/extension.js`
106. 
107. 接入：
108. 
109. - `buildProjectIndex`
110. 
111. 并在构造 `LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider` 时注入：
112. 
113. ```js
114. const includeTreeProvider = new LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider({
115.     searchFileFromPaths,
116.     buildProjectIndex,
117. });
118. ```
119. 
120. 这意味着实际运行时的 Include Tree 已开始消费项目级索引结果。
````

</details>

### ✅ `apply_patch`

<details>
<summary>Arguments</summary>

````json
"*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: D:\\Project\\vscode-lsdyna\\.github\\doc\\large_file_execution_record_phase2_include_tree_missing_parity.md\n+# vscode-lsdyna 大文件方案执行记录（Phase 2：Include Tree 缺失节点快照一致性修复）\n+\n+## 1. 本轮目标\n+\n+修复一个已经明确存在的快照路径一致性缺口：\n+\n+- `projectIndexer.buildProjectIndex()` 会记录 `missingFiles`\n+- 旧的 Include Tree 递归 `_buildItem()` 路径会把缺失 include 渲染成 warning / `not found`\n+- 但新的快照路径 `loadProjectSnapshot() -> graph.toTree() -> _buildItemFromTreeNode()` 会把这些缺失 include 丢掉\n+\n+本轮目标就是把这条缺口补齐，并且**只修这个缺口**，不顺手扩大范围到 cycle/diagnostic 之类的其它一致性议题。\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 2. 根因\n+\n+根因不在 provider，而在图投影层：\n+\n+1. `ProjectGraph.children` 只保存已解析成功的文件边\n+2. `ProjectGraph.toTree()` 只根据 `children` 递归物化树\n+3. 因此缺失 include 虽然进入了 `missingFiles`，却从未进入树投影\n+\n+这意味着：\n+\n+- 索引层知道“有缺失文件”\n+- 树投影层却无法表达“缺失文件仍然是一个可见节点”\n+\n+所以快照路径天然比旧递归路径少了一类节点。\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 3. TDD 过程\n+\n+### 3.1 先补失败测试\n+\n+本轮先写了两个失败测试：\n+\n+1. `test/core/project/projectIndexer.test.js`\n+   - `preserves missing includes as tree nodes in include order`\n+   - 证明 `snapshot.graph.toTree(rootFile)` 必须保留缺失 include，并保持 include 顺序稳定\n+\n+2. `test/extension.test.js`\n+   - `preserves missing include nodes when building tree items from a project snapshot`\n+   - 证明 Include Tree provider 走快照路径时，最终仍然能看到 `not found` 节点\n+\n+先跑：\n+\n+```powershell\n+npx mocha test\\core\\project\\projectIndexer.test.js test\\extension.test.js --grep \"preserves missing include\"\n+```\n+\n+结果先失败，失败点也非常直接：\n+\n+- `ProjectGraph.toTree()` 结果里没有缺失节点\n+- provider 从快照构树后也只剩已解析节点\n+\n+这说明测试确实卡住了当前缺口，而不是写成了“现状即通过”的伪测试。\n+\n+### 3.2 最小实现\n+\n+实现策略刻意保持最小范围：\n+\n+1. 在 `ProjectGraph` 中新增独立的 `includeEntries` 顺序表\n+   - 已解析 include 进入 `children` + `includeEntries`\n+   - 缺失 include 进入 `missingFiles` + `includeEntries`\n+\n+2. `ProjectGraph.toTree()` 改为基于 `includeEntries` 投影\n+   - 已解析节点继续递归\n+   - 缺失节点输出 `{ filePath, fileName, missing: true, children: [] }`\n+\n+3. `buildProjectIndex()` 为缺失 include 补充一个稳定的候选 `filePath`\n+   - 使用首个 search path 做 `path.resolve(...)`\n+   - 这样 TreeItem 仍然有稳定路径/tooltip，同时不会误报为存在\n+\n+4. `includeTreeProvider` 在快照路径消费 `node.missing`\n+   - `missing: true` 时直接按不存在节点渲染\n+   - 即使磁盘状态在快照之后变化，也不会把快照里的缺失节点误渲染成正常文件\n+\n+### 3.3 为什么这是企业级更稳的修法\n+\n+因为它没有把“缺失节点”塞进现有 resolved-only API 里硬拧语义，而是：\n+\n+- 保留 `getChildren()` / `getParents()` 的既有 resolved 行为\n+- 新增用于树投影的顺序元数据\n+- 用加法方式补齐快照树表达力\n+\n+这样改动面小，但语义更清楚，也更方便以后继续补其它快照一致性问题。\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 4. 实际改动\n+\n+### 4.1 `src/core/project/projectGraph.js`\n+\n+- 新增 `includeEntries`\n+- 新增 `addIncludeEntry()` / `getIncludeEntries()`\n+- `addIncludeEdge()` 现在同步登记树投影顺序\n+- `addMissingFile()` 现在同步登记缺失树节点元数据\n+- `toTree()` 改为按 `includeEntries` 物化，保留缺失节点\n+\n+### 4.2 `src/core/project/projectIndexer.js`\n+\n+- 缺失 include 记录里新增 `filePath`\n+- 该 `filePath` 作为快照树里缺失节点的稳定展示路径\n+\n+### 4.3 `src/client/providers/includeTreeProvider.js`\n+\n+- `_buildItemFromTreeNode()` 识别 `node.missing`\n+- 快照路径下的缺失节点继续显示 warning / `not found`\n+\n+### 4.4 测试\n+\n+- `test/core/project/projectIndexer.test.js`\n+- `test/extension.test.js`\n+\n+新增用例覆盖：\n+\n+- 快照树保留缺失节点\n+- 缺失节点顺序稳定\n+- Include Tree 快照路径渲染 `not found`\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 5. 验证\n+\n+本轮验证顺序：\n+\n+```powershell\n+npx mocha test\\core\\project\\projectIndexer.test.js test\\extension.test.js --grep \"preserves missing include|projectIndexer|LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider\"\n+npm test\n+git diff --check\n+```\n+\n+预期结果：\n+\n+- 相关 focused tests 全绿\n+- 全量 `npm test` 全绿\n+- `git diff --check` 无 whitespace / conflict marker 问题\n+\n+---\n+\n+## 6. 结论\n+\n+本轮完成的是一个非常明确的 Phase 2 收口动作：\n+\n+**统一项目快照现在不仅能表达已解析 include，也能表达“解析失败但必须可见”的缺失 include 节点。**\n+\n+这让 Include Tree 的快照路径与旧递归路径在“缺失文件可视化”这一关键行为上恢复一致，同时没有扩大到其它尚未设计完成的一致性议题。\n*** End Patch\n"
````

</details>

### ✅ `view`

**view the file at D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_execution_record_phase2_include_tree_missing_parity.md.**

D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_execution_record_phase2_include_tree_missing_parity.md (lines 1-220)

<details>
<summary>149 lines</summary>

````
1. # vscode-lsdyna 大文件方案执行记录（Phase 2：Include Tree 缺失节点快照一致性修复）
2. 
3. ## 1. 本轮目标
4. 
5. 修复一个已经明确存在的快照路径一致性缺口：
6. 
7. - `projectIndexer.buildProjectIndex()` 会记录 `missingFiles`
8. - 旧的 Include Tree 递归 `_buildItem()` 路径会把缺失 include 渲染成 warning / `not found`
9. - 但新的快照路径 `loadProjectSnapshot() -> graph.toTree() -> _buildItemFromTreeNode()` 会把这些缺失 include 丢掉
10. 
11. 本轮目标就是把这条缺口补齐，并且**只修这个缺口**，不顺手扩大范围到 cycle/diagnostic 之类的其它一致性议题。
12. 
13. ---
14. 
15. ## 2. 根因
16. 
17. 根因不在 provider，而在图投影层：
18. 
19. 1. `ProjectGraph.children` 只保存已解析成功的文件边
20. 2. `ProjectGraph.toTree()` 只根据 `children` 递归物化树
21. 3. 因此缺失 include 虽然进入了 `missingFiles`，却从未进入树投影
22. 
23. 这意味着：
24. 
25. - 索引层知道“有缺失文件”
26. - 树投影层却无法表达“缺失文件仍然是一个可见节点”
27. 
28. 所以快照路径天然比旧递归路径少了一类节点。
29. 
30. ---
31. 
32. ## 3. TDD 过程
33. 
34. ### 3.1 先补失败测试
35. 
36. 本轮先写了两个失败测试：
37. 
38. 1. `test/core/project/projectIndexer.test.js`
39.    - `preserves missing includes as tree nodes in include order`
40.    - 证明 `snapshot.graph.toTree(rootFile)` 必须保留缺失 include，并保持 include 顺序稳定
41. 
42. 2. `test/extension.test.js`
43.    - `preserves missing include nodes when building tree items from a project snapshot`
44.    - 证明 Include Tree provider 走快照路径时，最终仍然能看到 `not found` 节点
45. 
46. 先跑：
47. 
48. ```powershell
49. npx mocha test\core\project\projectIndexer.test.js test\extension.test.js --grep "preserves missing include"
50. ```
51. 
52. 结果先失败，失败点也非常直接：
53. 
54. - `ProjectGraph.toTree()` 结果里没有缺失节点
55. - provider 从快照构树后也只剩已解析节点
56. 
57. 这说明测试确实卡住了当前缺口，而不是写成了“现状即通过”的伪测试。
58. 
59. ### 3.2 最小实现
60. 
61. 实现策略刻意保持最小范围：
62. 
63. 1. 在 `ProjectGraph` 中新增独立的 `includeEntries` 顺序表
64.    - 已解析 include 进入 `children` + `includeEntries`
65.    - 缺失 include 进入 `missingFiles` + `includeEntries`
66. 
67. 2. `ProjectGraph.toTree()` 改为基于 `includeEntries` 投影
68.    - 已解析节点继续递归
69.    - 缺失节点输出 `{ filePath, fileName, missing: true, children: [] }`
70. 
71. 3. `buildProjectIndex()` 为缺失 include 补充一个稳定的候选 `filePath`
72.    - 使用首个 search path 做 `path.resolve(...)`
73.    - 这样 TreeItem 仍然有稳定路径/tooltip，同时不会误报为存在
74. 
75. 4. `includeTreeProvider` 在快照路径消费 `node.missing`
76.    - `missing: true` 时直接按不存在节点渲染
77.    - 即使磁盘状态在快照之后变化，也不会把快照里的缺失节点误渲染成正常文件
78. 
79. ### 3.3 为什么这是企业级更稳的修法
80. 
81. 因为它没有把“缺失节点”塞进现有 resolved-only API 里硬拧语义，而是：
82. 
83. - 保留 `getChildren()` / `getParents()` 的既有 resolved 行为
84. - 新增用于树投影的顺序元数据
85. - 用加法方式补齐快照树表达力
86. 
87. 这样改动面小，但语义更清楚，也更方便以后继续补其它快照一致性问题。
88. 
89. ---
90. 
91. ## 4. 实际改动
92. 
93. ### 4.1 `src/core/project/projectGraph.js`
94. 
95. - 新增 `includeEntries`
96. - 新增 `addIncludeEntry()` / `getIncludeEntries()`
97. - `addIncludeEdge()` 现在同步登记树投影顺序
98. - `addMissingFile()` 现在同步登记缺失树节点元数据
99. - `toTree()` 改为按 `includeEntries` 物化，保留缺失节点
100. 
101. ### 4.2 `src/core/project/projectIndexer.js`
102. 
103. - 缺失 include 记录里新增 `filePath`
104. - 该 `filePath` 作为快照树里缺失节点的稳定展示路径
105. 
106. ### 4.3 `src/client/providers/includeTreeProvider.js`
107. 
108. - `_buildItemFromTreeNode()` 识别 `node.missing`
109. - 快照路径下的缺失节点继续显示 warning / `not found`
110. 
111. ### 4.4 测试
112. 
113. - `test/core/project/projectIndexer.test.js`
114. - `test/extension.test.js`
115. 
116. 新增用例覆盖：
117. 
118. - 快照树保留缺失节点
119. - 缺失节点顺序稳定
120. - Include Tree 快照路径渲染 `not found`
121. 
122. ---
123. 
124. ## 5. 验证
125. 
126. 本轮验证顺序：
127. 
128. ```powershell
129. npx mocha test\core\project\projectIndexer.test.js test\extension.test.js --grep "preserves missing include|projectIndexer|LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider"
130. npm test
131. git diff --check
132. ```
133. 
134. 预期结果：
135. 
136. - 相关 focused tests 全绿
137. - 全量 `npm test` 全绿
138. - `git diff --check` 无 whitespace / conflict marker 问题
139. 
140. ---
141. 
142. ## 6. 结论
143. 
144. 本轮完成的是一个非常明确的 Phase 2 收口动作：
145. 
146. **统一项目快照现在不仅能表达已解析 include，也能表达“解析失败但必须可见”的缺失 include 节点。**
147. 
148. 这让 Include Tree 的快照路径与旧递归路径在“缺失文件可视化”这一关键行为上恢复一致，同时没有扩大到其它尚未设计完成的一致性议题。
149.
````

</details>

### ✅ `task`

**Reviewing commit**

<details>
<summary>Arguments</summary>

```json
{
  "description": "Reviewing commit",
  "agent_type": "superpowers:code-reviewer",
  "name": "include-tree-review",
  "prompt": "Review commit c352a4bcf24355220970bdae29cec38b92b33bc2 in repository D:\\Project\\vscode-lsdyna against its immediate parent f72ff4e28630b6086fc9f7bf0ad9fdc9a7a24f2b.\n\nWhat was implemented:\n- Restore Include Tree snapshot-path parity for missing include entries only during the migration parser -> projectIndexer/projectGraph -> indexClient -> providers.\n- Unresolved include entries should remain visible in snapshot tree projection and render as missing/not-found nodes in the Include Tree provider.\n- Must not regress resolved include order or normal tree rendering.\n\nPlan/requirements summary:\n- Root cause was that ProjectGraph.children only stored resolved edges and ProjectGraph.toTree() projected only children, so missing includes known to the index were dropped in snapshot tree.\n- Intended fix was minimal scope: keep resolved graph APIs as-is, add tree-projection metadata so both resolved and missing includes preserve include order, project missing nodes as { filePath, fileName, missing: true, children: [] }, and have includeTreeProvider render missing snapshot nodes as warning/not found without broadening to cycles/diagnostics.\n- Current task was specifically to fix missing include snapshot parity only.\n\nPlease review for substantive issues only: correctness, logic flaws, edge cases, regression risk, or important missing tests. Ignore style/trivia. Return PASS/FAIL, concrete findings with file references, and an assessment of whether the current tests are sufficient for the intended scope."
}
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>26 lines</summary>

````
FAIL

Findings:
1. Important — duplicate missing include directives are still collapsed in snapshot trees  
   - `src/core/project/projectGraph.js:18-26` deduplicates `includeEntries` by `(filePath, missing)`.  
   - `src/core/project/projectGraph.js:80-83` builds `toTree()` from that deduped list.  
   - But the source scan/index path preserves every missing directive: `src/core/project/projectIndexer.js:40-49` calls `addMissingFile()` for each unresolved include, and the non-snapshot tree path also renders one node per include directive in order (`src/client/providers/includeTreeProvider.js:90-97`).  
   - Result: repeated unresolved includes lose parity in snapshot projection. For:
     ```
     *INCLUDE
     missing.key
     missing.key
     ```
     `snapshot.missingFiles` contains 2 entries, but `snapshot.graph.toTree(root).children` contains only 1 missing node. That violates the intended “missing include snapshot parity” behavior.

Assessment of tests:
- Current tests are not sufficient for the intended scope.
- What is covered well:
  - single missing include preserved in order in snapshot tree (`test/core/project/projectIndexer.test.js:120-156`)
  - provider renders missing snapshot nodes as not found (`test/extension.test.js:523-544`)
- What is still missing:
  - regression test for repeated identical missing include directives from the same parent, ensuring snapshot tree preserves count and order
  - ideally a provider-level test confirming duplicate missing snapshot nodes both render

Verification:
- `npm test` passes on this commit.
- I reproduced the duplicate-missing case locally; the tree collapses two missing directives into one node.

Overall:
- The change is otherwise narrowly scoped and aligns with the intended approach, but this duplicate-missing edge case is a real correctness gap within the exact feature being fixed.
````

</details>

<details>
<summary>92 lines</summary>

```
1. 'use strict';
2. 
3. class ProjectGraph {
4.     constructor() {
5.         this.children = new Map();
6.         this.includeEntries = new Map();
7.         this.parents = new Map();
8.         this.missingFiles = [];
9.         this.cycles = [];
10.     }
11. 
12.     addFile(filePath) {
13.         if (!this.children.has(filePath)) this.children.set(filePath, []);
14.         if (!this.includeEntries.has(filePath)) this.includeEntries.set(filePath, []);
15.         if (!this.parents.has(filePath)) this.parents.set(filePath, []);
16.     }
17. 
18.     addIncludeEntry(fromFile, entry) {
19.         this.addFile(fromFile);
20.         const entries = this.includeEntries.get(fromFile);
21.         const exists = entries.some(candidate =>
22.             candidate.filePath === entry.filePath && Boolean(candidate.missing) === Boolean(entry.missing)
23.         );
24.         if (!exists) {
25.             entries.push(entry);
26.         }
27.     }
28. 
29.     addIncludeEdge(fromFile, toFile) {
30.         this.addFile(fromFile);
31.         this.addFile(toFile);
32. 
33.         if (!this.children.get(fromFile).includes(toFile)) {
34.             this.children.get(fromFile).push(toFile);
35.         }
36.         if (!this.parents.get(toFile).includes(fromFile)) {
37.             this.parents.get(toFile).push(fromFile);
38.         }
39. 
40.         this.addIncludeEntry(fromFile, { filePath: toFile });
41.     }
42. 
43.     addMissingFile(record) {
44.         this.missingFiles.push(record);
45.         if (record.fromFile && record.filePath) {
46.             this.addIncludeEntry(record.fromFile, {
47.                 filePath: record.filePath,
48.                 fileName: record.fileName,
49.                 missing: true,
50.             });
51.         }
52.     }
53. 
54.     addCycle(record) {
55.         this.cycles.push(record);
56.     }
57. 
58.     getChildren(filePath) {
59.         return [...(this.children.get(filePath) || [])];
60.     }
61. 
62.     getParents(filePath) {
63.         return [...(this.parents.get(filePath) || [])];
64.     }
65. 
66.     getIncludeEntries(filePath) {
67.         return [...(this.includeEntries.get(filePath) || [])];
68.     }
69. 
70.     toTree(rootFile, ancestry = []) {
71.         if (ancestry.includes(rootFile)) {
72.             return {
73.                 filePath: rootFile,
74.                 children: [],
75.             };
76.         }
77. 
78.         return {
79.             filePath: rootFile,
80.             children: this.getIncludeEntries(rootFile).map(entry => (
81.                 entry.missing
82.                     ? { ...entry, children: [] }
83.                     : this.toTree(entry.filePath, [...ancestry, rootFile])
84.             )),
85.         };
86.     }
87. }
88. 
89. module.exports = {
90.     ProjectGraph,
91. };
92.
```

### ✅ `view`

**view the file at D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\src\core\project\projectIndexer.js.**

D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\src\core\project\projectIndexer.js (lines 1-220)

<details>
<summary>81 lines</summary>

```
1. 'use strict';
2. 
3. const fs = require('fs');
4. const path = require('path');
5. 
6. const includeScanner = require('../parser/includeScanner');
7. const keywordScanner = require('../parser/keywordScanner');
8. const { ProjectGraph } = require('./projectGraph');
9. 
10. function resolveIncludeFromSearchPaths(fileName, searchPaths) {
11.     for (const searchPath of searchPaths) {
12.         const fullPath = path.resolve(searchPath, fileName);
13.         if (fs.existsSync(fullPath)) return fullPath;
14.     }
15.     return null;
16. }
17. 
18. function addKeywordUsages(keywordMap, keywords) {
19.     for (const keywordEntry of keywords) {
20.         if (!keywordMap.has(keywordEntry.keyword)) keywordMap.set(keywordEntry.keyword, []);
21.         keywordMap.get(keywordEntry.keyword).push(keywordEntry);
22.     }
23. }
24. 
25. async function buildProjectIndex(rootFile) {
26.     const files = [];
27.     const keywordMap = new Map();
28.     const graph = new ProjectGraph();
29.     const visited = new Set();
30. 
31.     async function visit(filePath, ancestry = []) {
32.         if (visited.has(filePath)) return;
33.         visited.add(filePath);
34.         files.push(filePath);
35.         graph.addFile(filePath);
36. 
37.         const keywords = await keywordScanner.collectKeywordsFromFile(filePath);
38.         addKeywordUsages(keywordMap, keywords);
39. 
40.         const { includeEntries, searchPaths } = await includeScanner.collectIncludeDirectivesFromFile(filePath);
41.         for (const { fileName } of includeEntries) {
42.             const resolvedPath = resolveIncludeFromSearchPaths(fileName, searchPaths);
43.             if (!resolvedPath) {
44.                 graph.addMissingFile({
45.                     fromFile: filePath,
46.                     fileName,
47.                     filePath: path.resolve(searchPaths[0] || path.dirname(filePath), fileName),
48.                 });
49.                 continue;
50.             }
51. 
52.             if (ancestry.includes(resolvedPath) || resolvedPath === filePath) {
53.                 graph.addCycle({
54.                     fromFile: filePath,
55.                     toFile: resolvedPath,
56.                     path: [...ancestry, filePath, resolvedPath],
57.                 });
58.                 continue;
59.             }
60. 
61.             graph.addIncludeEdge(filePath, resolvedPath);
62.             await visit(resolvedPath, [...ancestry, filePath]);
63.         }
64.     }
65. 
66.     await visit(rootFile);
67. 
68.     return {
69.         rootFile,
70.         files,
71.         graph,
72.         keywordMap,
73.         missingFiles: graph.missingFiles,
74.         cycles: graph.cycles,
75.     };
76. }
77. 
78. module.exports = {
79.     buildProjectIndex,
80. };
81.
```

</details>

D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\src\client\providers\includeTreeProvider.js (lines 1-220)

<details>
<summary>119 lines</summary>

```
1. 'use strict';
2. 
3. const fs = require('fs');
4. const path = require('path');
5. const vscode = require('vscode');
6. 
7. const includeScanner = require('../../core/parser/includeScanner');
8. 
9. class IncludeItem extends vscode.TreeItem {
10.     constructor(filePath, exists) {
11.         super(path.basename(filePath), vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.Collapsed);
12.         this.filePath = filePath;
13.         this.children = [];
14.         this.tooltip = filePath;
15.         this.iconPath = new vscode.ThemeIcon(exists ? 'file' : 'warning');
16.         if (!exists) this.description = 'not found';
17.         if (exists) {
18.             this.command = { command: 'vscode.open', title: 'Open', arguments: [vscode.Uri.file(filePath)] };
19.         }
20.     }
21. }
22. 
23. class LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider {
24.     constructor({ searchFileFromPaths, loadProjectSnapshot } = {}) {
25.         this.searchFileFromPaths = searchFileFromPaths;
26.         this.loadProjectSnapshot = loadProjectSnapshot;
27.         this._onDidChangeTreeData = new vscode.EventEmitter();
28.         this.onDidChangeTreeData = this._onDidChangeTreeData.event;
29.         this.root = null;
30.     }
31. 
32.     async scan() {
33.         const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
34.         if (!editor || editor.document.languageId !== 'lsdyna') {
35.             vscode.window.showWarningMessage('Open an LS-DYNA file first.');
36.             return;
37.         }
38.         await vscode.window.withProgress(
39.             { location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification, title: 'Scanning includes…', cancellable: false },
40.             async (progress) => {
41.                 if (this.loadProjectSnapshot) {
42.                     const snapshot = await this.loadProjectSnapshot(editor.document.uri.fsPath);
43.                     this.root = this._buildRootFromSnapshot(snapshot, editor.document.uri.fsPath);
44.                 } else {
45.                     this.root = await this._buildItem(editor.document.uri.fsPath, new Set(), progress);
46.                 }
47.                 this.root.collapsibleState = vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.Expanded;
48.                 this._onDidChangeTreeData.fire(undefined);
49.             }
50.         );
51.     }
52. 
53.     _buildItemFromTreeNode(node) {
54.         const exists = !node.missing && fs.existsSync(node.filePath);
55.         const item = new IncludeItem(node.filePath, exists);
56.         item.children = (node.children || []).map(childNode => this._buildItemFromTreeNode(childNode));
57.         item.collapsibleState = item.children.length > 0
58.             ? vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.Collapsed
59.             : vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.None;
60.         return item;
61.     }
62. 
63.     _buildRootFromSnapshot(snapshot, rootFile) {
64.         return this._buildItemFromTreeNode(snapshot.graph.toTree(rootFile));
65.     }
66. 
67.     async _buildItem(filePath, visited, progress) {
68.         const exists = fs.existsSync(filePath);
69.         const item = new IncludeItem(filePath, exists);
70. 
71.         if (!exists || visited.has(filePath)) {
72.             item.collapsibleState = vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.None;
73.             return item;
74.         }
75. 
76.         visited.add(filePath);
77.         progress.report({ message: path.basename(filePath) });
78. 
79.         let includeEntries;
80.         let searchPaths;
81.         try {
82.             ({ includeEntries, searchPaths } = await includeScanner.collectIncludeDirectivesFromFile(filePath));
83.         } catch (error) {
84.             item.description = 'scan failed';
85.             item.tooltip = `${filePath}\n${error.message}`;
86.             item.collapsibleState = vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.None;
87.             return item;
88.         }
89. 
90.         for (const { fileName } of includeEntries) {
91.             let childPath;
92.             try {
93.                 childPath = this.searchFileFromPaths(fileName, searchPaths);
94.             } catch (e) {
95.                 childPath = path.resolve(path.dirname(filePath), fileName);
96.             }
97.             item.children.push(await this._buildItem(childPath, new Set(visited), progress));
98.         }
99. 
100.         item.collapsibleState = item.children.length > 0
101.             ? vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.Collapsed
102.             : vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.None;
103. 
104.         await new Promise(r => setImmediate(r));
105.         return item;
106.     }
107. 
108.     getTreeItem(element) { return element; }
109. 
110.     getChildren(element) {
111.         if (!this.root) return [];
112.         return element ? element.children : [this.root];
113.     }
114. }
115. 
116. module.exports = {
117.     LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider,
118. };
119.
```

</details>

### 💬 Copilot

FAIL

Findings
- Important — duplicate unresolved includes are collapsed in snapshot trees, so snapshot-path parity is still incomplete for repeated missing entries.
  - `src/core/project/projectGraph.js:18-26` deduplicates `includeEntries` by `filePath` + `missing`.
  - `src/core/project/projectGraph.js:80-84` renders snapshot children from that deduplicated list.
  - But indexing records every missing directive occurrence (`src/core/project/projectIndexer.js:40-49`), and the legacy provider path renders one node per include directive in order (`src/client/providers/includeTreeProvider.js:90-97`).
  - Repro: with
    ```text
    *INCLUDE
    missing.key
    missing.key
    ```
    `snapshot.missingFiles.length === 2`, but `snapshot.graph.toTree(root).children.length === 1`.
  - That is a correctness gap within the exact scope of this change: missing include entries are not fully preserved in the snapshot projection.

Tests
- Current tests are not sufficient for the intended scope.
- Covered well:
  - single missing include preserved in snapshot tree order (`test/core/project/projectIndexer.test.js:120-156`)
  - missing snapshot node rendered as `not found` in provider (`test/extension.test.js:523-544`)
- Missing important coverage:
  - repeated identical missing include directives from the same parent should remain duplicated and ordered in `toTree()`
  - ideally, a provider-level test that both duplicated missing nodes render

Notes
- `npm test` passes on this commit.
- Aside from the duplicate-missing case, the change appears narrowly scoped and aligned with the stated plan.

### ✅ `view`

**view the file at D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\src\core\project\projectGraph.js.**

D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\src\core\project\projectGraph.js (lines 1-220)

<details>
<summary>96 lines</summary>

```
1. 'use strict';
2. 
3. class ProjectGraph {
4.     constructor() {
5.         this.children = new Map();
6.         this.includeEntries = new Map();
7.         this.parents = new Map();
8.         this.missingFiles = [];
9.         this.cycles = [];
10.     }
11. 
12.     addFile(filePath) {
13.         if (!this.children.has(filePath)) this.children.set(filePath, []);
14.         if (!this.includeEntries.has(filePath)) this.includeEntries.set(filePath, []);
15.         if (!this.parents.has(filePath)) this.parents.set(filePath, []);
16.     }
17. 
18.     addIncludeEntry(fromFile, entry) {
19.         this.addFile(fromFile);
20.         const entries = this.includeEntries.get(fromFile);
21.         if (entry.missing) {
22.             entries.push(entry);
23.             return;
24.         }
25.         const exists = entries.some(candidate =>
26.             candidate.filePath === entry.filePath && Boolean(candidate.missing) === Boolean(entry.missing)
27.         );
28.         if (!exists) {
29.             entries.push(entry);
30.         }
31.     }
32. 
33.     addIncludeEdge(fromFile, toFile) {
34.         this.addFile(fromFile);
35.         this.addFile(toFile);
36. 
37.         if (!this.children.get(fromFile).includes(toFile)) {
38.             this.children.get(fromFile).push(toFile);
39.         }
40.         if (!this.parents.get(toFile).includes(fromFile)) {
41.             this.parents.get(toFile).push(fromFile);
42.         }
43. 
44.         this.addIncludeEntry(fromFile, { filePath: toFile });
45.     }
46. 
47.     addMissingFile(record) {
48.         this.missingFiles.push(record);
49.         if (record.fromFile && record.filePath) {
50.             this.addIncludeEntry(record.fromFile, {
51.                 filePath: record.filePath,
52.                 fileName: record.fileName,
53.                 missing: true,
54.             });
55.         }
56.     }
57. 
58.     addCycle(record) {
59.         this.cycles.push(record);
60.     }
61. 
62.     getChildren(filePath) {
63.         return [...(this.children.get(filePath) || [])];
64.     }
65. 
66.     getParents(filePath) {
67.         return [...(this.parents.get(filePath) || [])];
68.     }
69. 
70.     getIncludeEntries(filePath) {
71.         return [...(this.includeEntries.get(filePath) || [])];
72.     }
73. 
74.     toTree(rootFile, ancestry = []) {
75.         if (ancestry.includes(rootFile)) {
76.             return {
77.                 filePath: rootFile,
78.                 children: [],
79.             };
80.         }
81. 
82.         return {
83.             filePath: rootFile,
84.             children: this.getIncludeEntries(rootFile).map(entry => (
85.                 entry.missing
86.                     ? { ...entry, children: [] }
87.                     : this.toTree(entry.filePath, [...ancestry, rootFile])
88.             )),
89.         };
90.     }
91. }
92. 
93. module.exports = {
94.     ProjectGraph,
95. };
96.
```

</details>

D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\src\client\providers\includeTreeProvider.js (lines 1-260)

<details>
<summary>119 lines</summary>

```
1. 'use strict';
2. 
3. const fs = require('fs');
4. const path = require('path');
5. const vscode = require('vscode');
6. 
7. const includeScanner = require('../../core/parser/includeScanner');
8. 
9. class IncludeItem extends vscode.TreeItem {
10.     constructor(filePath, exists) {
11.         super(path.basename(filePath), vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.Collapsed);
12.         this.filePath = filePath;
13.         this.children = [];
14.         this.tooltip = filePath;
15.         this.iconPath = new vscode.ThemeIcon(exists ? 'file' : 'warning');
16.         if (!exists) this.description = 'not found';
17.         if (exists) {
18.             this.command = { command: 'vscode.open', title: 'Open', arguments: [vscode.Uri.file(filePath)] };
19.         }
20.     }
21. }
22. 
23. class LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider {
24.     constructor({ searchFileFromPaths, loadProjectSnapshot } = {}) {
25.         this.searchFileFromPaths = searchFileFromPaths;
26.         this.loadProjectSnapshot = loadProjectSnapshot;
27.         this._onDidChangeTreeData = new vscode.EventEmitter();
28.         this.onDidChangeTreeData = this._onDidChangeTreeData.event;
29.         this.root = null;
30.     }
31. 
32.     async scan() {
33.         const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
34.         if (!editor || editor.document.languageId !== 'lsdyna') {
35.             vscode.window.showWarningMessage('Open an LS-DYNA file first.');
36.             return;
37.         }
38.         await vscode.window.withProgress(
39.             { location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification, title: 'Scanning includes…', cancellable: false },
40.             async (progress) => {
41.                 if (this.loadProjectSnapshot) {
42.                     const snapshot = await this.loadProjectSnapshot(editor.document.uri.fsPath);
43.                     this.root = this._buildRootFromSnapshot(snapshot, editor.document.uri.fsPath);
44.                 } else {
45.                     this.root = await this._buildItem(editor.document.uri.fsPath, new Set(), progress);
46.                 }
47.                 this.root.collapsibleState = vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.Expanded;
48.                 this._onDidChangeTreeData.fire(undefined);
49.             }
50.         );
51.     }
52. 
53.     _buildItemFromTreeNode(node) {
54.         const exists = !node.missing && fs.existsSync(node.filePath);
55.         const item = new IncludeItem(node.filePath, exists);
56.         item.children = (node.children || []).map(childNode => this._buildItemFromTreeNode(childNode));
57.         item.collapsibleState = item.children.length > 0
58.             ? vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.Collapsed
59.             : vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.None;
60.         return item;
61.     }
62. 
63.     _buildRootFromSnapshot(snapshot, rootFile) {
64.         return this._buildItemFromTreeNode(snapshot.graph.toTree(rootFile));
65.     }
66. 
67.     async _buildItem(filePath, visited, progress) {
68.         const exists = fs.existsSync(filePath);
69.         const item = new IncludeItem(filePath, exists);
70. 
71.         if (!exists || visited.has(filePath)) {
72.             item.collapsibleState = vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.None;
73.             return item;
74.         }
75. 
76.         visited.add(filePath);
77.         progress.report({ message: path.basename(filePath) });
78. 
79.         let includeEntries;
80.         let searchPaths;
81.         try {
82.             ({ includeEntries, searchPaths } = await includeScanner.collectIncludeDirectivesFromFile(filePath));
83.         } catch (error) {
84.             item.description = 'scan failed';
85.             item.tooltip = `${filePath}\n${error.message}`;
86.             item.collapsibleState = vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.None;
87.             return item;
88.         }
89. 
90.         for (const { fileName } of includeEntries) {
91.             let childPath;
92.             try {
93.                 childPath = this.searchFileFromPaths(fileName, searchPaths);
94.             } catch (e) {
95.                 childPath = path.resolve(path.dirname(filePath), fileName);
96.             }
97.             item.children.push(await this._buildItem(childPath, new Set(visited), progress));
98.         }
99. 
100.         item.collapsibleState = item.children.length > 0
101.             ? vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.Collapsed
102.             : vscode.TreeItemCollapsibleState.None;
103. 
104.         await new Promise(r => setImmediate(r));
105.         return item;
106.     }
107. 
108.     getTreeItem(element) { return element; }
109. 
110.     getChildren(element) {
111.         if (!this.root) return [];
112.         return element ? element.children : [this.root];
113.     }
114. }
115. 
116. module.exports = {
117.     LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider,
118. };
119.
```

</details>

1. 'use strict';
2. 
3. const assert = require('assert');
4. const fs = require('fs');
5. const os = require('os');
6. const path = require('path');
7. 
8. const { buildProjectIndex } = require('../../../src/core/project/projectIndexer');
9. 
10. describe('projectIndexer', () => {
11.     it('recursively aggregates included files and keyword usages into one project snapshot', async () => {
12.         const tempRoot = fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'lsdyna-project-index-'));
13.         const submodelsDir = path.join(tempRoot, 'submodels');
14.         const rootFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'main.k');
15.         const aFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'a.key');
16.         const bFile = path.join(submodelsDir, 'b.key');
17. 
18.         fs.mkdirSync(submodelsDir);
19.         fs.writeFileSync(rootFile, '*INCLUDE_PATH_RELATIVE\nsubmodels\n*INCLUDE\na.key\nb.key\n', 'utf8');
20.         fs.writeFileSync(aFile, '*PART\npart line\n', 'utf8');
21.         fs.writeFileSync(bFile, '*MAT_ELASTIC\nmat line\n', 'utf8');
22. 
23.         try {
24.             const snapshot = await buildProjectIndex(rootFile);
25. 
26.             assert.deepEqual(snapshot.files.sort(), [rootFile, aFile, bFile].sort());
27.             assert.deepEqual(
28.                 snapshot.keywordMap.get('PART').map(entry => entry.filePath),
29.                 [aFile]
30.             );
31.             assert.deepEqual(
32.                 snapshot.keywordMap.get('MAT_ELASTIC').map(entry => entry.filePath),
33.                 [bFile]
34.             );
35.             assert.deepEqual(snapshot.missingFiles, []);
36.             assert.deepEqual(snapshot.cycles, []);
37.         } finally {
38.             fs.rmSync(tempRoot, { recursive: true, force: true });
39.         }
40.     });
41. 
42.     it('records missing includes without aborting the rest of the project scan', async () => {
43.         const tempRoot = fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'lsdyna-project-index-'));
44.         const rootFile = path.join(tempRoot, 'main.k');
45. 
46.         fs.writeFileSync(rootFile, '*INCLUDE\nmissing.key\n*PART\n', 'utf8');
47. 
48.         try {
49.             const snapshot = await buildProjectIndex(rootFile);
50. 
51.             assert.deepEqual(snapshot.files, [rootFile]);
52.             assert.equal(snapshot.missingFiles.length, 1);
53.             assert.equal(snapshot.missingFiles[0].fromFile, rootFile);
54.             assert.equal(snapshot.missingFiles[0].fileName, 'missing.key');
55.             assert.deepEqual(
56.                 snapshot.keywordMap.get('PART').map(entry => entry.filePath),
57.                 [rootFile]
58.             );
59.         } finally {
60.             fs.rmSync(tempRoot, { recursive: true, force: true });
61.         }
62.     });

<sub>⏱️ 150m 8s</sub>

### ✅ `view`

**view the file at D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_rollout_plan.md.**

D:\Project\vscode-lsdyna\.github\doc\large_file_rollout_plan.md (lines 1-260)

<details>
<summary>260 lines</summary>

````
1. # vscode-lsdyna 大文件解析改造可行性评估与落地计划
2. 
3. > **结论先行：** 方案在本项目中**可行**，但不适合一次性把 `large_file_plan.md` 中的全部能力直接落进当前代码。更稳妥的方式是：**先模块化现有扫描逻辑，再引入后台扫描与缓存，最后按性能数据决定是否全面切到 LSP 架构。**
4. 
5. ## 1. 可行性结论
6. 
7. ### 1.1 为什么说“可行”
8. 
9. 当前项目已经具备继续演进到大文件架构的几个关键前提：
10. 
11. 1. **已有流式扫描基础**  
12.    `src/extension.js` 中的 `collectIncludeDirectivesFromFile()` 和 `LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider._buildRootsAsync()` 已经在使用 `fs.createReadStream` + `readline` 做流式扫描，而不是一次性把整个文件读进一个巨型字符串。
13. 
14. 2. **已有大文件保护机制**  
15.    `LARGE_DOCUMENT_LINE_THRESHOLD` 已经让自动诊断、自动装饰、自动符号、自动 hover 等能力在超大文档上主动降级，说明当前项目已经接受“超大文件需要特化路径”的设计方向。
16. 
17. 3. **已有异步让步（yield）意识**  
18.    `STREAM_SCAN_YIELD_INTERVAL` 与 `setImmediate()` 已经体现出“长扫描过程中主动让出事件循环”的思路，这对后续迁移到 Worker / Server 侧是很好的过渡基础。
19. 
20. 4. **已有 Include Tree / Keyword Index 的业务闭环**  
21.    当前插件已经能生成 Include Tree、递归收集关键字，并有一套单测覆盖。这意味着后续改造重点是**性能与架构升级**，不是从零定义业务行为。
22. 
23. ### 1.2 为什么不能直接照搬原方案
24. 
25. `large_file_plan.md` 里的目标架构非常强，但当前项目与该架构之间还有明显落差：
26. 
27. 1. **当前实现高度集中在一个文件**  
28.    `src/extension.js` 约 1300 行，UI 注册、扫描逻辑、缓存、解析辅助函数、TreeView Provider 全都在一起。  
29.    这会让“一步切 LSP + Worker + 增量 AST + 磁盘缓存”的改造风险过高。
30. 
31. 2. **当前项目是纯 JS 扩展，工程体系偏轻量**  
32.    `package.json` 目前没有构建流程，也没有 LSP、缓存数据库、worker 封装等依赖。  
33.    如果直接引入完整架构，会同时叠加目录重构、依赖升级、运行模型变化三种风险。
34. 
35. 3. **现阶段业务目标仍聚焦两件事**  
36.    当前插件的大文件核心诉求，本质上还是：
37.    - 高性能生成 Include Tree
38.    - 高性能生成 Keyword Index  
39.    因此第一阶段应优先围绕这两项能力建立稳定架构，而不是一开始就做完整语义服务器。
40. 
41. ### 1.3 推荐判断
42. 
43. | 能力项 | 可行性 | 建议 |
44. | --- | --- | --- |
45. | 流式扫描继续深化 | 高 | 立即落地 |
46. | 将重扫描迁移到后台 Worker | 高 | 第一阶段落地 |
47. | 建立项目级索引与文件摘要缓存 | 高 | 第一阶段落地 |
48. | 文件级增量更新 | 中高 | 第二阶段落地 |
49. | LSP 进程隔离 | 中高 | 在模块拆分稳定后落地 |
50. | SharedArrayBuffer 零拷贝 | 中 | 先不做，留作性能兜底 |
51. | SQLite 持久缓存 | 中 | 建议第二阶段再引入 |
52. | FlatBuffers / 二进制序列化 | 中低 | 不是 MVP 必需项 |
53. | AST + Interval Tree 精细补丁 | 中 | 先做块级/文件级增量，再逐步细化 |
54. 
55. **最终建议：采用“分阶段落地、每阶段可独立上线”的路线。**
56. 
57. ---
58. 
59. ## 2. 落地边界与目标
60. 
61. ## 2.1 本轮改造的目标
62. 
63. 1. 超大 `.k/.key` 文件和包含大量子文件的工程，能够在**不阻塞 UI** 的前提下生成 Include Tree 与 Keyword Index。
64. 2. 扫描结果可以复用，避免对未变更文件重复解析。
65. 3. 对于激活文档与工程文件变更，支持至少**文件级**增量更新。
66. 4. 保留现有中小文件体验，不因大文件改造破坏已有功能。
67. 5. 为后续 LSP 化保留清晰边界，而不是把复杂度继续堆进 `src/extension.js`。
68. 
69. ## 2.2 本轮改造不做的事
70. 
71. 1. 不在第一阶段实现完整的 LS-DYNA 语义分析器。
72. 2. 不在第一阶段实现 `*INCLUDE_TRANSFORM` 的 ID 映射语义索引。
73. 3. 不在第一阶段实现 SharedArrayBuffer / Atomics 级别的极限优化。
74. 4. 不在第一阶段把所有现有编辑器能力都迁移到后台服务；优先迁移**重扫描能力**。
75. 
76. ## 2.3 验收指标
77. 
78. 建议把以下指标写入后续开发验收：
79. 
80. 1. 打开超大工程后，手动触发 Include Tree / Keyword Index 扫描时，VS Code 不出现明显卡顿。
81. 2. 冷启动首次扫描可完成，热启动命中缓存后明显快于冷启动。
82. 3. 单个 include 文件变更后，仅重建受影响的文件索引与工程聚合结果。
83. 4. 缓存有明确大小上限、失效规则和清理策略。
84. 5. 现有测试不退化，并补齐大文件 / 多文件工程 / 缓存 / 增量更新覆盖。
85. 
86. ---
87. 
88. ## 3. 目标架构（适配本项目后的版本）
89. 
90. ### 3.1 架构原则
91. 
92. 1. **Extension Host 只保留轻逻辑**：命令注册、TreeView 更新、用户提示、配置读取。
93. 2. **重扫描逻辑独立成核心模块**：可先由 Worker 承载，后续平滑迁移到 LSP Server。
94. 3. **先做文件级索引，再做块级增量**：不要一开始就引入过于复杂的 AST 修补。
95. 4. **缓存先解决“复用”，再解决“极致压缩”**：先有稳定命中与失效，再谈 SQLite / FlatBuffers。
96. 
97. ### 3.2 推荐架构分层
98. 
99. ```text
100. VS Code Extension Host
101.   ├─ src/extension.js                  # 激活入口，逐步瘦身
102.   ├─ src/client/commands/*             # 命令注册
103.   ├─ src/client/providers/*            # TreeView / UI Provider
104.   └─ src/client/services/indexClient.js
105. 
106. Shared Core
107.   ├─ src/core/parser/*                 # 流式扫描器
108.   ├─ src/core/project/*                # 项目图、聚合索引
109.   ├─ src/core/cache/*                  # L1 / L2 缓存
110.   ├─ src/core/incremental/*            # 文件级/块级增量
111.   └─ src/core/model/*                  # DTO / 索引结构
112. 
113. Background Engine
114.   ├─ src/worker/scanWorker.js          # 第一阶段
115.   ├─ src/worker/workerPool.js
116.   └─ src/server/*                      # 第二阶段：LSP 化
117. ```
118. 
119. ### 3.3 数据模型建议
120. 
121. 后续不要直接在 UI Provider 中拼装原始扫描结果，统一引入以下几个中间模型：
122. 
123. 1. **FileScanResult**  
124.    单文件扫描结果，只存：
125.    - `filePath`
126.    - `mtimeMs`
127.    - `size`
128.    - `hash`（可后补）
129.    - `includes[]`
130.    - `keywords[]`
131.    - `stats`
132. 
133. 2. **ProjectGraph**  
134.    负责表示文件之间的 include 关系、缺失引用、循环引用、反向依赖。
135. 
136. 3. **ProjectIndexSnapshot**  
137.    负责表示整个工程当前可直接渲染到 UI 的聚合结果：
138.    - Include Tree 根节点
139.    - Keyword Index 聚合表
140.    - 缺失文件列表
141.    - 循环引用列表
142. 
143. 4. **CacheRecord**  
144.    用于缓存层统一管理：
145.    - key
146.    - version
147.    - lastAccess
148.    - byteSize
149.    - payloadPath / payload
150. 
151. ---
152. 
153. ## 4. 建议修改的目录与文件
154. 
155. 以下路径是结合当前项目结构后，推荐新增或改造的文件布局。
156. 
157. ### 4.1 必改文件
158. 
159. - Modify: `package.json`
160. - Modify: `src/extension.js`
161. - Modify: `README.md`
162. - Modify: `test/extension.test.js`
163. 
164. ### 4.2 第一阶段新增文件
165. 
166. - Create: `src/client/providers/includeTreeProvider.js`
167. - Create: `src/client/providers/keywordIndexProvider.js`
168. - Create: `src/client/services/indexClient.js`
169. - Create: `src/core/model/fileScanResult.js`
170. - Create: `src/core/model/projectIndexSnapshot.js`
171. - Create: `src/core/parser/includeScanner.js`
172. - Create: `src/core/parser/keywordScanner.js`
173. - Create: `src/core/parser/blockScanner.js`
174. - Create: `src/core/project/projectGraph.js`
175. - Create: `src/core/project/projectIndexer.js`
176. - Create: `src/core/cache/memoryCache.js`
177. - Create: `src/core/cache/cacheKeys.js`
178. - Create: `src/core/cache/cacheManifestStore.js`
179. - Create: `src/core/incremental/fileInvalidation.js`
180. - Create: `src/worker/scanWorker.js`
181. - Create: `src/worker/workerPool.js`
182. 
183. ### 4.3 第二阶段新增文件
184. 
185. - Create: `src/server/server.js`
186. - Create: `src/server/sessionManager.js`
187. - Create: `src/server/fileWatcher.js`
188. - Create: `src/server/requestRouter.js`

190. - Create: `src/core/cache/sqliteCacheStore.js`

192. 
193. ### 4.4 测试目录建议
194. 
195. - Create: `test/core/parser/includeScanner.test.js`
196. - Create: `test/core/parser/keywordScanner.test.js`
197. - Create: `test/core/project/projectIndexer.test.js`
198. - Create: `test/core/cache/cacheManifestStore.test.js`
199. - Create: `test/core/incremental/fileInvalidation.test.js`
200. - Create: `test/worker/workerPool.test.js`
201. - Create: `test/fixtures/large-project/`
202. 
203. ---
204. 
205. ## 5. 分阶段详细落地计划
206. 
207. ## Phase 0：基线冻结与拆分准备
208. 
209. **目标：** 在不改变行为的前提下，把现有单文件实现拆出边界，为后续性能改造降风险。
210. 
211. **涉及文件：**
212. - Modify: `src/extension.js`
213. - Modify: `test/extension.test.js`
214. - Create: `src/client/providers/includeTreeProvider.js`
215. - Create: `src/client/providers/keywordIndexProvider.js`
216. 
217. - [ ] 将 `LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider` 从 `src/extension.js` 抽出到 `src/client/providers/includeTreeProvider.js`
218. - [ ] 将 `LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider` 从 `src/extension.js` 抽出到 `src/client/providers/keywordIndexProvider.js`
219. - [ ] 让 `src/extension.js` 只保留激活入口、命令注册、Provider 装配
220. - [ ] 保持 CommonJS 风格，不在此阶段引入 TypeScript，避免同时叠加语言迁移风险
221. - [ ] 先不改动现有用户可见行为，确保本阶段是“纯重构”
222. 
223. **阶段产物：**
224. - Extension 入口瘦身
225. - Provider 与扫描逻辑边界初步分离
226. - 后续 Worker / LSP 能接入统一 client 层
227. 
228. **阶段验收：**
229. - 现有 Include Tree / Keyword Index 功能行为不变
230. - 现有大文件 guard 逻辑不变
231. - 现有测试通过范围不缩小
232. 
233. ## Phase 1：抽取统一流式扫描内核
234. 
235. **目标：** 把 Include / Keyword 的扫描统一沉淀到 `src/core/parser`，让“从文件扫描出结构摘要”成为可复用能力。
236. 
237. **涉及文件：**
238. - Create: `src/core/parser/includeScanner.js`
239. - Create: `src/core/parser/keywordScanner.js`
240. - Create: `src/core/parser/blockScanner.js`
241. - Create: `src/core/model/fileScanResult.js`
242. - Modify: `src/client/providers/includeTreeProvider.js`
243. - Modify: `src/client/providers/keywordIndexProvider.js`
244. - Create: `test/core/parser/includeScanner.test.js`
245. - Create: `test/core/parser/keywordScanner.test.js`
246. 
247. - [ ] 将当前 `collectIncludeDirectivesFromFile()` 的逻辑迁移为独立的 `includeScanner`
248. - [ ] 将当前 `_buildRootsAsync()` 中的关键字扫描迁移为独立的 `keywordScanner`
249. - [ ] 提供统一的 `scanFile(filePath, options)` 接口，返回 `FileScanResult`
250. - [ ] `FileScanResult` 至少包含：includes、keywords、lineStats、warnings
251. - [ ] 保留当前的 `fs.createReadStream` 流式路径，不退回全量字符串解析
252. - [ ] 在扫描器中加入“只提取结构摘要，不保留无关数据行”的约束，控制内存
253. 
254. **阶段产物：**
255. - 单文件扫描结果结构化
256. - Include 与 Keyword 两类逻辑不再散落在 UI Provider 内
257. - 为缓存、增量更新、后台并行打下统一输入输出格式
258. 
259. **阶段验收：**
260. - 同一文件同时可产出 include 信息与 keyword 摘要
````

<details>

````
1. # vscode-lsdyna 大文件方案执行记录（Phase 2：引入共享 indexClient）
2. 
3. ## 1. 本轮目标
4. 
5. 在已经完成：
6. 
7. - `projectIndexer`
8. - Include Tree 快照接线
9. - Keyword Index 快照接线
10. 
11. 之后，再补上客户端层的共享入口：
12. 
13. **引入 `src/client/services/indexClient.js`，让 Include Tree 与 Keyword Index 都通过统一的 `loadProjectSnapshot()` 访问项目快照，而不是各自直接注入 `buildProjectIndex`。**
14. 
15. ---
16. 
17. ## 2. 为什么这一步现在做
18. 
19. 前两轮已经把两个递归视图都接回统一项目快照，但它们仍然直接依赖核心层的：
20. 
21. - `buildProjectIndex(rootFile)`
22. 
23. 这会留下一个边界问题：
24. 
25. 1. Provider 仍然知道“如何构建项目快照”
26. 2. 后续如果把执行位置迁到 worker / LSP，需要同时改多个 Provider 注入口
27. 
28. 因此本轮不是改变快照内容，而是把**客户端调用边界**先稳定成：
29. 
30. - `indexClient.loadProjectSnapshot(rootFile)`
31. 
32. 这样后续即使底层从主线程切到 worker，Provider 也不需要再知道细节。
33. 
34. ---
35. 
36. ## 3. TDD 过程
37. 
38. ### 3.1 先写失败测试
39. 
40. 本轮先新增/改写三组最小测试约束：
41. 
42. 1. `createIndexClient` 必须暴露 `loadProjectSnapshot`
43. 2. Include Tree 扫描时必须优先走 `loadProjectSnapshot`
44. 3. `activate()` 必须给两个 Tree Provider 注入同一个共享快照加载入口
45. 
46. 先运行聚焦测试：
47. 
48. ```powershell
49. npx mocha test\client\services\indexClient.test.js test\extension.test.js --grep "createIndexClient|LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider|LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider|activate"
50. ```
51. 
52. 结果先红，失败原因直接指向缺失能力：
53. 
54. - `createIndexClient` 不存在
55. - Include Tree 还没有消费 `loadProjectSnapshot`
56. - Keyword Index 仍然走旧的 `collectIncludeFiles()` 回退路径
57. - `activate()` 没有给两个 Provider 注入共享 loader
58. 
59. ### 3.2 再写最小实现
60. 
61. 本轮保持最小改动：
62. 
63. 1. 新增 `src/client/services/indexClient.js`
64. 2. `createIndexClient({ buildProjectIndex })` 只暴露 `loadProjectSnapshot(rootFile)`
65. 3. `LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider` 改为依赖 `loadProjectSnapshot`
66. 4. `LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider` 改为依赖 `loadProjectSnapshot`
67. 5. `extension.js` 只创建一次 `indexClient`，并把同一个 `loadProjectSnapshot` 注入到两个 Provider
68. 
69. 本轮**没有**提前加入缓存、后台线程、协议层转换，保持行为与数据形状不变。
70. 
71. ### 3.3 验证转绿
72. 
73. 先跑聚焦测试，再跑全量测试，最后跑 diff 格式检查。
74. 
75. 结果为绿，说明：
76. 
77. - 共享 client 入口已经存在
78. - 两个 Provider 都已切换到统一的客户端快照加载边界
79. - 旧的快照内容和 UI 投影行为未被改写
80. 
81. ---
82. 
83. ## 4. 实际代码改动
84. 
85. ### 4.1 `src/client/services/indexClient.js`
86. 
87. 新增最小客户端层：
88. 
89. - `createIndexClient({ buildProjectIndex })`
90. - `loadProjectSnapshot(rootFile)`
91. 
92. 当前职责非常单一：
93. 
94. 1. 接收核心层的项目索引构建函数
95. 2. 对客户端暴露统一快照加载入口
96. 
97. ### 4.2 `src/client/providers/includeTreeProvider.js`
98. 
99. 调整为：
100. 
101. - 构造时注入 `loadProjectSnapshot`
102. - `scan()` 优先消费共享快照 loader
103. 
104. 保留原有 `_buildItem()` 回退路径，降低迁移风险。
105. 
106. ### 4.3 `src/client/providers/keywordIndexProvider.js`
107. 
108. 调整为：
109. 
110. - 构造时注入 `loadProjectSnapshot`
111. - recursive 模式优先通过共享 loader 获取 `snapshot.keywordMap`
112. 
113. local 模式与文档即时扫描逻辑保持不变。
114. 
115. ### 4.4 `src/extension.js`
116. 
117. 新增：
118. 
119. ```js
120. const indexClient = createIndexClient({ buildProjectIndex });
121. ```
122. 
123. 并把同一个：
124. 
125. - `indexClient.loadProjectSnapshot`
126. 
127. 注入到：
128. 
129. - `LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider`
130. - `LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider`
131. 
132. 这样扩展激活时只构造一次客户端服务，Provider 只依赖共享客户端边界。
133. 
134. ### 4.5 `test/client/services/indexClient.test.js`
135. 
136. 新增对最小 client API 的直接测试，确保：
137. 
138. - 共享入口名称固定为 `loadProjectSnapshot`
139. - 调用会透传到 `buildProjectIndex`
140. 
141. ---
142. 
143. ## 5. 设计取舍
144. 
145. ## 5.1 先稳定客户端边界，不提前切执行边界
146. 
147. 本轮的重点是把 Provider 对项目快照的依赖收口到 client 层。
148. 先稳定：
149. 
150. - `loadProjectSnapshot(rootFile)`
151. 
152. 再决定它最终是：
153. 
154. - 主线程直调
155. - worker 代理
156. - 语言服务代理
157. 
158. 这是更稳健的企业级推进顺序。
159. 
160. ## 5.2 只暴露一个最小入口
161. 
162. 当前 `indexClient` 没有暴露额外能力，例如：
163. 
164. - 缓存失效
165. - 订阅更新
166. - 后台任务状态
167. 
168. 原因是这些能力当前没有测试约束，也还不是当前迁移所必需。
169. 先把最小入口做对，后续再按真实需求扩展。
170. 
171. ---
172. 
173. ## 6. 验证结果
174. 
175. 执行：
176. 
177. ```powershell
178. npx mocha test\client\services\indexClient.test.js test\extension.test.js --grep "createIndexClient|LsdynaIncludeTreeProvider|LsdynaKeywordIndexProvider|activate"
179. npm test
180. git diff --check
181. ```
182. 
183. 结果：
184. 
185. - 聚焦测试通过
186. - 全量测试通过
187. - diff 格式检查通过
188. 
189. ---
190. 
191. ## 7. 对总体计划的推进意义
192. 
193. 做到这一步之后，Phase 2 的输入边界已经进一步收口为：
194. 
195. 1. 核心层：`buildProjectIndex(rootFile)`
196. 2. 客户端层：`loadProjectSnapshot(rootFile)`
197. 3. UI 层：只消费 snapshot，不再直接依赖核心构建函数
198. 
199. 这意味着后续如果切到 worker / LSP，变化点主要会落在 `indexClient` 内部，而不是再分散到多个 Provider。
200. 
201. ---
202. 
203. ## 8. 一句话结论
204. 
205. **本轮完成的是“把共享项目快照入口正式下沉到 client 层”，让 Include Tree 和 Keyword Index 的客户端依赖边界统一为 `loadProjectSnapshot()`，为后续 worker/LSP 迁移提前收口。**
206.
````

</details>
